organization_description_1: Founded in 2018, Hashdex is a global pioneer in crypto asset management. We are building pathways to prosperity by opening the crypto ecosystem to the world. Trusted with over $962M (as of Mar 8, 2024) in client assets, our simple and secure products help innovative investors join the emerging crypto economy.  Dedicated to bringing crypto opportunities to the mainstream, we partnered with Nasdaq to develop the Nasdaq Crypto Index (NCI) and Nasdaq Crypto Index Europe (NCIE) to provide global investors a reliable benchmark for this dynamic asset class. In 2021, we introduced the world's first crypto index ETF, enabling many investors to allocate to crypto for the first time.  We believe open blockchains are unlocking global growth and making economic opportunity more abundant and accessible. We are committed to accelerating the development of the crypto ecosystem by empowering everyone to participate in this transformational opportunity for the world.

headline: CEO | Country Manager | Sales VP | Board Advisor
summary: Sou um executivo experiente com histórico comprovado na liderança de iniciativas de alto impacto no setor de TIC, atuando em áreas como vendas, parcerias estratégicas, fusões e aquisições, e transformação digital. Entrego soluções integradas e serviços de consultoria especializada para grandes empresas e organizações do setor público, impulsionando crescimento por meio da inovação. 🔹 Liderança & Transformação Como CEO da Inetum Brasil (Bain Capital PE), liderei mais de 500 consultores e conquistei o maior contrato de implementação SAP nas Américas. Lancei os portfólios SAP S/4HANA Cloud e Salesforce, além de expandir as ofertas de cibersegurança e transformação digital. 🔹 Experiência Global & Estratégia de Go-to-Market Na NEC, em Tóquio, liderei o marketing global de produtos de Cloud Computing, Public Safety e Cyber Security por cinco anos, conduzindo estratégias de go-to-market, planejamento de vendas e capacitação de parceiros em diversas regiões. Também atuei como Vice-Presidente do Grupo na sede da Inetum em Paris. 🔹 M&A & Expansão de Negócios Realizei com sucesso a análise, fusão e aquisição de diversas empresas de TI na América Latina, e fui Chairman do Comitê de Tecnologia da Câmara Espanhola de Comércio, promovendo o desenvolvimento de negócios transfronteiriços. 🔹 Parcerias Estratégicas Estabeleci e escalei alianças com os principais players do mercado, incluindo SAP, Salesforce, AWS, Microsoft, ORACLE, OutSystems, BMC, ServiceNow, Cisco, Juniper, Palo Alto, entre outros. 💡 Minha missão é ajudar organizações a aproveitarem o poder da tecnologia da informação e comunicação para transformar, inovar e crescer, de forma sustentável e competitiva.
organization_description_1: Fundada em 2001, a assertif se destaca como referência em soluções inteligentes de fluxo de caixa para empresas de todos os portes. Com mais de 23 anos de experiência e reconhecimento como um Great Place to Work, nossa equipe altamente qualificada combina tecnologia de ponta e conhecimento multidisciplinar para oferecer resultados ágeis, inovadores e um ambiente de trabalho excepcional.  Nosso foco principal reside na mineração de dados previdenciários, fiscais e de depósitos recursais, identificando oportunidades tributárias estratégicas para empresas do Lucro Presumido e Lucro Real. Além disso, somos credenciados como administradora judicial homologada na 1ª e 2ª Vara em São Paulo, garantindo segurança e confiabilidade em nossos serviços.  Ao longo de nossa trajetória, conquistamos a confiança de mais de 2.000 clientes, entre os quais empresas renomadas como Google, XP Investimentos, Agibank, Bradesco, Votorantim, Atento, Tim, Lorenzetti, Calçados Beira Rio, Lojas Marisa e GE Brasil. Nossos resultados comprovam nossa expertise: já levantamos mais de R$ 1.500.000.000 em possibilidades tributárias e recursais, impulsionando o crescimento e a rentabilidade de nossos clientes.  Acreditamos que o sucesso só é possível com um ambiente de trabalho positivo e engajador. Por isso, a Assertif se orgulha de ser certificada como um Great Place to Work, reconhecendo nosso compromisso com a responsabilidade social, diversidade, sustentabilidade e o bem-estar de nossos colaboradores.

headline: CMO and Partner @Stark Bank | Board Member | Angel Investor
summary: Ao longo de mais de 20 anos de carreira, aprendi que a resiliência é meu maior ativo e que marketing e branding são minha verdadeira paixão.  Liderei marcas globais e nacionais em empresas como L’Oréal, Estée Lauder, Bacardi, Alpargatas e MadeiraMadeira, até assumir o desafio de transformar o mercado financeiro como CMO do Stark Bank, fintech B2B apoiada por Jeff Bezos.  Em paralelo, fundei a MR Marketing & Branding, onde aplico minha metodologia autoral, criada para ajudar empresas a transformar cultura em marca forte e marca em resultado.  Atuo também como mentora, conselheira e investidora-anjo, apoiando líderes e negócios que buscam crescer de forma sustentável e diferenciada. Tenho orgulho de participar de iniciativas de protagonismo feminino e educação, porque acredito que conhecimento e representatividade transformam o futuro.  Contato: contato@marcelarezende.com  ———  With over 20 years of experience, I’ve learned that resilience has been my greatest asset — and that marketing and branding are my true passions.  I built my career leading global and national brands such as L’Oréal, Estée Lauder, Bacardi, Havaianas (Alpargatas), and MadeiraMadeira, before taking on the challenge of transforming the financial sector as CMO of Stark Bank, a B2B fintech backed by Jeff Bezos.  In parallel, I founded MR Marketing & Branding, where I apply my proprietary methodology, designed to help companies turn culture into strong brands — and brands into tangible results.  I also act as an advisor, mentor, and angel investor, supporting leaders and businesses aiming to grow sustainably and distinctively. In addition, I am committed to female leadership and education projects, as I believe knowledge and representation are powerful drivers of transformation.  Contact: contato@marcelarezende.com

summary: Executivo com sólida experiência em General Management, Operações e Marketing em grandes empresas de tecnologia e serviços financeiros, como Conta Azul, Uber, QuintoAndar, Getnet e Banco Santander.  Expertise em liderança estratégica, com foco na definição de metas, gestão de P&L, controle orçamentário e otimização de processos para garantir crescimento sustentável e escalabilidade.  Capacidade de tomar decisões rápidas e eficazes, baseadas em dados e insights de mercado, impulsionando resultados tangíveis mesmo em ambientes desafiadores.  Liderança na construção e desenvolvimento de equipes de alto desempenho, promovendo culturas de inovação, colaboração e foco em resultados.  Visão de negócios afiada, com habilidades para identificar oportunidades de crescimento, criar estratégias de mercado e posicionar a marca de forma competitiva.  Adaptabilidade em ambientes dinâmicos, com histórico de implementação de soluções inovadoras para enfrentar mudanças no mercado e desafios operacionais.  Forte capacidade de comunicação e gestão de stakeholders, com experiência em negociações estratégicas, parcerias comerciais e expansão internacional.  Experiência internacional liderando projetos em diversos países, incluindo Brasil, Paraguai, Peru e Honduras, e participação em cursos nos EUA, Reino Unido, Alemanha, França e Singapura.  Graduado em Engenharia Mecânica, com MBA em Finanças Corporativas e um MBA Internacional em Administração de Empresas pelo INSEAD. Fluente em Inglês e Espanhol, iniciante em Francês e Alemão. Português nativo.  Seus interesses pessoais incluem tênis de mesa e atividades culturais, demonstrando seu compromisso comunitário e seu interesse no desenvolvimento pessoal e social.  #GeneralManager #GM #Operações #Marketing #COO # CMO #Tech #Finanças #Diretor #Head

Pioneiros em ERP 100% em nuvem para PMEs, oferecemos uma plataforma que integra gestão, serviços financeiros e contabilidade em um só lugar, de forma simples, conectada e eficiente. headline: Senior Full Stack Engineer | AI & Data Systems | Co-Founder @ Tamy AI | Building AI-native products at scale
summary: ⚡ AI-Driven Full Stack Engineer @ NuORDER | Co-Founder of Tamy (Fintech GPT)  As a Full Stack Engineer at NuORDER by Lightspeed, I design and scale AI-powered retail tech that drives measurable impact for global brands. In parallel, I serve as Co-Founder & Lead Engineer at Tamy, a fintech side project transforming how Brazilians manage money through WhatsApp + Open Finance + Generative AI.  With over 7 years of experience in SaaS, fintech, and AI, I’ve: 	•	Built scalable, secure platforms used by thousands of users 	•	Integrated LLMs, vector databases, and OpenAI APIs into production 	•	Delivered up to 30% efficiency gains in enterprise environments 	•	Championed design systems, micro frontends, and developer experience  ⸻  🧩 Technical Strengths • Frontend: React, TypeScript, Micro Frontends, Design Systems • Backend & AI: NestJS, Node.js, Go, Prisma, PostgreSQL, LangChain, Weaviate, OpenAI • Fintech: Open Finance APIs, Pluggy, WhatsApp Cloud API • DevOps/Security: Terraform, CI/CD, Sentry, Secure-by-Design Principles  ⸻  🚀 Results That Matter • Tamy (Side Project): 4,600+ users, 48K+ financial transactions analyzed, built on LLMs + WhatsApp • NuORDER: 30% platform efficiency boost, launched GPT-4-powered buyer tools, led scalable data computation projects • Rock Content: Reduced infra cost by 97%, led design system overhaul, increased UI delivery speed 75%  ⸻  If you’re building the next wave of AI apps, fintech tools, or LLM-powered platforms, I’d love to connect.  📫 benites.amorim@gmail.com 🌍 papode.dev | YouTube
position_description_1: As the Co-Founder and Lead Engineer at Tamy, I lead the development of a cutting-edge AI-powered financial assistant designed to help Brazilians change their relationship with money.  We built Tamy as a conversational financial coach available 24/7 via WhatsApp, combining Open Finance, behavioral psychology, and generative AI to make budgeting, planning, and decision-making accessible to everyone, from individuals to small businesses.  🔧 Key Responsibilities & Contributions 	•	System Architecture: Designed and implemented a modular, scalable backend using NestJS, Prisma ORM, and PostgreSQL, ensuring high performance and extensibility. 	•	AI Features: Integrated OpenAI models, LangGraph, and LangChain to power personalized financial advice, behavioral nudges, and real-time goal tracking. 	•	Open Finance Integration: Implemented secure and dynamic data synchronization using Pluggy API, enabling real-time access to users’ financial data. 	•	Advanced Categorization: Developed semantic and rule-based systems with self-learning, with Weaviate and LLM arbitration to categorize and analyze 48k+ transactions. 	•	Security by Design: Built advanced encryption, privacy compliance, and user data protection layers. 	•	Vector Intelligence: Leveraged vector stores for conversation memory, insights, and transaction pattern recognition across 4,600+ users. 	•	Continuous Deployment: Established a CI/CD pipeline for automated testing, deployment, and observability (Sentry, logging, metrics).  We’re on a mission to become the go-to financial assistant for LATAM.
position_description_2: As a Full Stack Engineer at NuORDER by Lightspeed, I leverage modern technologies to deliver scalable, maintainable solutions, improving system performance and user experiences in the fast-paced retail sector.  Key Achievements:  Backend Development: 	•	Built reliable server-side solutions using Go and Node.js, ensuring robust APIs and seamless microservice integration. Frontend Development: 	•	Enhanced user interfaces with TypeScript and React, boosting conversion rates by 20% and user engagement with responsive design principles. Retail Platform Optimization: 	•	Improved platform efficiency by 30% through backend enhancements. 	•	Increased team productivity by 25% by aligning technical execution with business goals. AI-Powered Solutions: 	•	Led the AI Assortment Assistant project, integrating OpenAI’s ChatGPT for dynamic data querying, enhancing buyer efficiency and user interaction. Quality Assurance: 	•	Expanded unit and E2E test coverage, reducing bug rates by 50% and ensuring product reliability.  # Formula Evaluation Service (Ongoing Project)  Currently leading the development of a TypeScript-based Formula Evaluation Service, designed for scalable and efficient assortment management.  Key Features: 	•	Dynamic Formula Evaluation: Uses dependency graphs and Topological Sorting to ensure accurate computation and prevent circular references. 	•	Caching Optimization: Implemented an LRU caching strategy, processing 1M+ rows/second with high cache efficiency. 	•	Error Handling & Security: Established robust protocols for input validation, formula parsing, and data integrity, ensuring reliability.  Impact: This solution improves system scalability, ensures computational accuracy, and reduces operational overhead for managing complex data relationships.
position_description_3: Em minha função como engenheiro front-end na NuOrder by Lightspeed, aproveitei tecnologias de ponta para arquitetar, desenvolver e refinar bases de código escalonáveis e sustentáveis, melhorando significativamente a qualidade do produto e a experiência do usuário. Colaborou estreitamente com a equipe de QA para expandir a cobertura de testes unitários e E2E, reduzindo as taxas de bugs do produto em 50% e garantindo a confiabilidade das soluções digitais.  5. headline: Funding Coordination, OSPO Enabler | Ethereum Foundation
summary: I work on the open source funding problem at the Ethereum Foundation, researching how money reaches (or fails to reach) the maintainers who keep critical software alive, and how Ethereum-native tools can reduce this leakage. My path here: 6+ years in technical recruitment, mostly sourcing developers on GitHub, which is what got me into open source communities in the first place. Then program management at OnlyDust, helping open source contributors succeed across Web3 ecosystems. Then business development at Vyper, an open source smart contract language and a company where I experienced firsthand what it means for a critical project to depend on a single, inconsistent funding source with no sustainable model underneath it. I'm always interested in connecting with people working on open source sustainability, funding mechanisms, and policy.

organization_description_1: For more than 25 years, Jump Trading has been home to people who see trading as the most fascinating problem in the world and want to solve it from every angle.   Headquartered in Chicago with 13 offices across 8 countries, we operate across asset classes, time zones, and horizons. If it trades, we want to trade it.  We are traders, engineers, and researchers working side by side to build the systems that move global markets. Our culture is built on curiosity, precision, and relentless iteration. We care deeply about impact, collaboration, and solving problems few ever get to see.  At Jump Trading, AI and machine learning are central to how we trade and build. We design and deploy advanced models, infrastructure, and tools to operate at scale in high-stakes, adversarial environments. From low-latency systems to cutting-edge research, we push the boundaries of what is possible.  We are also committed to the next generation of talent. Our student programs, from internships to our fully funded PhD Fellowships, provide hands-on experience, mentorship, and opportunities to do meaningful work. We support students at leading conferences worldwide and invite them to work with our teams on real-world challenges.
organization_description_2: Gro Intelligence illuminates the interrelationships between our earth’s ecology and human economy to help you see the big picture and act on the small details. From assessing the impact of climate change in real time to optimizing agricultural supply chains, Gro’s data, analytics, and forecast models provide the honest answers to what on earth is going on.  With the Gro platform, make better, more accurate decisions, long-term forecasts, and develop risk mitigation strategies.  Gro's offices are located in New York City; Nairobi, Kenya; and Singapore. Find open career opportunities on our careers page: https://gro-intelligence.com/about/careers
position_description_2: Built Gro’s Climate Team from the ground up by hiring Climate Scientists, Geospatial Analysts, Data Scientists, ML Engineers, and Financial Quantitative Researchers to create a global climate data platform seamlessly connecting a continuously updated history of environmental metrics from sensor, satellite, and re-analysis sources with a custom downscaled and debiased ensemble of the best scenario-based climate projection models from climate labs around the world. Launched a suite of risk indicators built on that platform, many employing proprietary ML and GenAI models, to standardize measurement and projection of physical climate risk across all geographies and climate perils. This included a UI for clients to utilize the data for both enterprise risk management and ESG regulatory disclosure. Led the creation of a prototype climate-financial risk engine, successfully generating otherwise factor-neutral portfolios of traded financial instruments to capture persistent alpha from climate trends and events (e.g. drought)
organization_description_3: Point72 is a leading global alternative investment firm led by Steven A. Cohen. Building on more than 30 years of investing experience, Point72 seeks to deliver superior returns for its investors through fundamental and systematic investing strategies across asset classes and geographies. We aim to attract and retain the industry’s brightest talent by cultivating an investor-led culture and committing to our people’s long-term growth.

summary: Katelyn is the Managing Partner of Avalanche, an early-stage venture firm investing in massive trends and founders building their life's work. summary: Sou vice-presidente de Novos Negócios do Grupo Boticário. Durante mais de 15 anos, já passei por diversos cargos e países dentro do grupo.   Fui responsável pela expansão internacional e desenvolvimento do canal online da companhia na Europa Ocidental, onde conduzi também o turnaround de O Boticário em Portugal. Liderei a recuperação da Eudora, formulando com a equipe um modelo de venda direta digital, o que levou a marca a se tornar a segunda maior do grupo.   Mais recentemente, meu papel foi transformar a maneira como o Grupo Boticário encarava a tecnologia. Focamos no cliente e trouxemos a tecnologia para o centro do negócio por meio de uma mudança de mentalidade e modus operandi. Nos próximos anos, construiremos soluções no GB que o tornarão ainda mais referência no mercado de varejo de tecnologia. Para fazer essa aceleração digital, entendemos que a fusão entre Tecnologia e Gente era uma grande oportunidade, e então virei líder das duas áreas. Por 5 anos, liderei também o braço de CVC da empresa. Desde setembro de 2024, assumi a VP de Novos Negócios.   Minha formação inicial foi em jornalismo, porque queria impactar as pessoas para deixar o mundo melhor. Mas, decidi que seguiria outro caminho para realizar meu desejo de mudar o mundo. Percebi que era possível trabalhar com pessoas que têm vontade de aprender, fazer projetos incríveis e gerar impacto positivo na sociedade dentro de empresas. Fiz pós-graduação em Administração de Empresas na Universidade Federal do Paraná e mestrado na IE Business School, na Espanha.

headline: Silicon Valley Cross Border Investment Banker and Capital Strategist Driving Business Growth and Funding Success for Entrepreneurs
summary: Ryan Baird, CEO of Baird Augustine, a cross-border neo investment bank, is renowned for his unwavering commitment to success, integrity, and a deep focus on risk.   Throughout his tenure, he has showcased exceptional leadership, attracting 11 million Monthly Active Users (MAU) and raising $35 million from institutional investors and Family Offices as the CEO of LYKA, a groundbreaking social media platform empowering Southeast Asian content creators to monetize their data.  As a Venture Partner at the GWC Innovator Fund, Ryan has been instrumental in fostering early-stage investments, including investing in Xpeng's Series A (NYSE: XPEV). Furthermore, he has organized prestigious events like G-Startup Worldwide and the Cross Board Venture Summit, offering CEOs, LPs, and institutional investors invaluable networking opportunities, portfolio showcases, deal sourcing, relationship-building, and industry insights.  Ryan's expertise extends into hedge funds. Having previously served as Head Trader & Risk Manager at Fineline Trading, he adeptly navigated financial market volatility during the Great Financial Crisis. In 2010, he successfully launched his own fund, Flotilla, where he arbitrated volatility, created exchange arbitrage algorithms, and traded exotic derivative positions.  His tenure at Morgan Stanley PWM on Sand Hill Road further bolsters his proficiency in institutional investing, covering US & Global portfolio management, risk management strategies, asset allocation techniques, derivative strategies, and building relationships with Ultra High Net Worth (UHNW) families.  With a notable track record of raising capital for his ventures, other GPs, and startups alike, Ryan's influence transcends the finance sector. His board memberships across various companies and non-profits underscore his steadfast dedication to driving significant impact across diverse industries.  Ryan Baird has firmly established himself as a prominent figure in Silicon Valley's cross-border institutional investing landscape. He embodies dynamic leadership qualities and exceptional investment acumen, while also possessing a unique ability to cultivate valuable connections in today's ever-evolving business environment.

headline: CEO, Vaiu Global | Patented Push-Payment Infrastructure | Former CTO, Visa Payments
summary: "Only 10% of companies successfully scale from $1M to $10M ARR. I help fintech companies join that 10%. As Fintech Lead at 123G, I specialize in payments infrastructure, regulatory strategy, and capital-efficient scaling for growth-stage financial technology companies. I work with fintech founders navigating the critical transition from founder-led operations to systematic scaling.  What I do for our clients:  Transform complex payments architectures into scalable, compliant platforms Design regulatory frameworks that accelerate rather than hinder growth Build capital-efficient scaling strategies for fintech infrastructure  I focus on fintech companies in the $1M-$10M range that have achieved product-market fit but struggle with the operational complexities of payments modernization and regulatory compliance. Before 123G, I led transformative initiatives across 25+ years in fintech - from scaling Volante's 600-person global team to 80% YoY growth, to managing Visa's $100M integration budget. I've been in the operator seat during three successful scaling transitions and multiple exits.  Philosophy: Scaling fintech isn't about perfecting payments technology—it's about orchestrating aligned execution across infrastructure, compliance, and growth engines simultaneously.  At 123G, we don't just advise—we roll up our sleeves as true partners. Our compensation is tied to outcomes, not outputs. Ready to turn your fintech scaling challenges into systematic breakthroughs? Let's discuss how to navigate the statistically brutal path from growth to scale."
organization_description_1: Seamlessly, swiftly, and securely pay and get paid in real-time with our revolutionary tokenization technology.   Our patent-pending technology safeguards sensitive credentials with bank-level security.  The result is immediate liquidity for payees and instant value for payors anchored by banks.  Envision a world where payments go beyond efficiency, becoming instantaneous, securely credential-free, and seamlessly integrated into your financial ecosystem.   With Vaiu Tokenized Pay, that vision is now a reality.  Traditional and modern payment methods often trap banks, businesses, and consumers in delays, complexities, and security vulnerabilities, stifling cash flow and eroding trust. Alternatively, distributed ledger technology is expensive.   In response, our patent-pending technology securely and in real-time bridges traditional banking with the digital landscape.  Enter Vaiu Tokenized Pay. Our innovative tokenization technology allows users to convert their funds into secure tokens, shielding information and facilitating instantaneous settlements anchored by banks. The outcome is immediate liquidity for payees and instant value for payors.   Vaiu Tokenized Pay will revolutionize finance within the open banking framework, unlocking a future of unmatched efficiency and liquidity.    Banks, retailers, and developers:  Join our Beta program: partner@vaiuglobal.com Interested Sales Partners can learn about our global sales channel: sales@vaiuglobal.com Investors: We have multiple types of investment opportunities. headline: Learner | Governance | Digital | Innovation
summary: With over 35 years of experience navigating in the digital world, Rodolfo Fücher serves as an executive, board member, investor, and entrepreneur. He currently sits on the Council for Sustainable Economic and Social Development under the Presidency of Brazil, an advisory board to President Luiz Inácio Lula da Silva, contributing to strategic discussions on national development. He actively serves on the boards of organizations such as: the Brazilian Software Companies Association (ABES), representing approximately 2,000 companies responsible for about 80% of the software and services sector's revenue in Brazil; the Brazilian Startup Association (AbStartups), one of the most prominent entities in the startup ecosystem, uniting members across the country with the goal of positioning Brazil among the world’s leading hubs for innovation and tech entrepreneurship; Bossa Invest, recognized as one of the most active venture capital firms in Latin America, with investments in over 1,500 startups; Instituto Brasil Digital, Softex, and various family businesses. He is also a member of the Innovation and Strategy Committee of the Brazilian Institute of Corporate Governance (IBGC). Rodolfo holds a degree in Information Technology from Universidade Presbiteriana Mackenzie and a postgraduate degree in Marketing from ESPM (Escola Superior de Propaganda e Marketing). His professional development includes executive education from some of the world’s top institutions, including: Brazilian Institute of Corporate Governance (IBGC) in corporate governance; Institute of Directors (IoD), London in Leadership and the Role of the Chair; Columbia Business School in digital strategy; MIT Sloan School of Management in global macroeconomics; Haas School of Business in venture capital strategies; Wharton School in neuroscience and business decision-making; GoNew in governance and the new economy; Singularity University in technological convergence; Saint Paul Business School in high-impact leadership; Hughes Hall, University of Cambridge in climate governance; Tsinghua University School of Economics and Management, China, in business development strategies. As a public speaker and lecturer, Rodolfo regularly presents on innovation, governance, and the impact of technology on business and society. He is committed to driving innovation and digital transformation as essential tools to strengthen competitiveness and growth.

headline: Family Office | Board Member | Guest Lecturer | Ex-JPMorgan & Fiserv
summary: Family office principal bridging Asia, the US, and the Middle East. Investing across real estate, technology, and alternatives via 76Columbus and championing next-gen family capital through the New Age Family Investment Club. Advisor, speaker, and lifelong builder of cross-border investment platforms.  Lixia is a seasoned family office investor, operator, entrepreneur, and advisor. With Asian heritage, Western education, and now Middle East residency after 15 years in the US, she bridges cross-border investments and cultures.  She is the Principal of 76Columbus, a single family office based in New York and Abu Dhabi, investing across real estate, technology, and alternative assets. Lixia founded the New Age Family Investment Club, a private platform in the UAE that connects next-generation family principals across the Middle East and Asia around innovative investment themes.  She serves on the LP Council for SuperReturn International, the Columbia Alumni Association board in the Middle East, and represents the Asian Family Legacy Foundation in MENA. Lixia is also a guest lecturer for the Family Office Course at HKUST, sharing her insights on family business dynamics, alternative asset allocation, and investor relations.  A recognized thought leader, she speaks at premier family office and alternative investment events, including the UAE Wealth Summit, Apex Investor Summit Abu Dhabi, SuperReturn (Asia, Dubai, Riyadh), and Dubai AI & Web3.  Previously, Lixia spent over a decade in the US in leadership roles managing global P&L for multinational fintech and financial institutions, including JPMorgan Chase and Fiserv. She also founded an AI and Web3 fintech company, is an angel investor, and an Advisor-in-Residence at Columbia University’s NYC Venture Lab.  Lixia holds a dual Executive MBA from Columbia Business School and London Business School, and an M.S. in IT from the University of Florida.  Originally from China, she now calls the UAE home. Outside work, she loves her two kittens, runs marathons, and hunts down the world’s spiciest food.

headline: Chairman Peninsula
summary: Eduardo Rossi é Presidente do Conselho de Administração da Península, empresa de investimentos da família Abilio Diniz e da qual faz parte há 14 anos. É Presidente do Conselho do Instituto Península, braço social da empresa. Rossi foi membro do Conselho de Administracao do Carrefour no Brasil por 10 anos e membro do Conselho de Administração do Carrefour na França por 2 anos.Possui mais de 20 anos de experiência em gestão de empresas familiares, asset management, fusões e aquisições. Foi Vice-Presidente do JP Morgan, em Nova York, além de possuir passagens por relevantes instituições financeiras globais. É bacharel em Administração de Empresas e Marketing pela FGV e possui MBA com honras pela Universidade Columbia, onde, entre 2018 e 2023, foi membro do Conselho do Global Family Enterprise Program.***Eduardo Rossi serves as Chairman of the Board at Península, an investment firm owned by the Abilio Diniz family, where he has been a significant contributor for 14 years. He also presides over the Board of Instituto Península, the company's social arm dedicated to supporting the advancement of Education and Sports in Brazil.In 2014, while still CEO of Península, he co-led the company's entry into the Carrefour Group. The following year, he joined the Board of Directors at Carrefour Brazil, a position he held for 10 years. In 2024 and 2025 he also served as a board member of Carrefour in France.  Rossi played a key role in Península's capital increases in both Carrefour Brazil and Carrefour Global, the IPO of Carrefour Brazil, the support for the selection of the Global CEO, among other strategic company milestones.With over 20 years of experience in managing family businesses, asset management, mergers, and acquisitions, Rossi was formerly the Vice President at JP Morgan in New York and has held positions at other significant global financial institutions. He holds a Bachelor's degree in Business Administration and Marketing from FGV and an MBA with honors from Columbia University, where he has been a board member of the Global Family Enterprise Program from 2018 to 2023.

organization_description_3: Dünyanın önde gelen perakende zinciri Carrefour Grubu’nun Türkiye’deki ilk marketini 1993 yılında İstanbul İçerenköy’de açmasıyla hiper market konseptini Türkiye’ye getiren ilk firma olmuştur.  1996 yılında Türkiye’nin en büyük topluluklarından Sabancı Holding ile Carrefour Grubu’nun gerçekleştirdiği ortaklık sonucunda CarrefourSA olarak yenilenmiş, ilk CarrefourSA marketini 1997 yılında Adana’da açmıştır.  2013 yılında yönetimin Sabancı Holding’e geçmesiyle oluşturulan yeni stratejiler doğrultusunda insan kaynakları, teknolojik altyapı, market konsepti gibi birçok alanda önemli yatırımlar hayata geçirerek sektörün öncü perakendecisi olma iddiasını sürdürmüştür.   Sektörde bir ilk olarak 2017 yılında müşterilerine market içinde gastronomik bir deneyim yaşatmak amacıyla hayata geçirdiği “Lezzet Arası” restoranları ve 2020 yılında yerel esnaf ve girişimcileri destekleyerek CarrefourSA çatısı altında buluşturmak üzere başlattığı “Bayilik” sistemi ile “Yeni Nesil Market” vizyonu doğrultunda büyümeye devam etmektedir.  Bugün 11 binden fazla çalışanı, “Hiper, Süper, Gurme, Mini” konseptlerindeki 900’den fazla marketi ve www.carrefoursa.com Online Marketinde müşterilerinin ihtiyaç ve beklentilerini en doğru şekilde karşılamak için çalışan CarrefourSA, 50 bin çeşit ürünü “Doğrusu CarrefourSA’da” anlayışıyla doğru kalitede ve doğru fiyata yılda 164 milyonu aşkın müşterisine ulaştırmaktadır.

headline: Co-Founder & CEO at Athena
summary: I am Co-founder & CEO of Athena Home Loans. Athena is on a mission to help Australians pay off their home loan faster – to give them a great home loan, then help them get rid of it. Athena is proud to have been certified as a B-Corp, recognizing the importance of changing Australia’s $2 trillion home loan industry for good. Since launch in early 2019, Athena has settled billions in home loans, making it one of Australia’s fastest growing fintechs. Athena has been recognised by multiple innovation awards, including Australia’s Most Innovative Company 2021 by the AFR and Australia’s Fintech of the Year 2021. I was recognized as Australian Fintech Leader of the Year (2020) and serve as Vice Chair of Fintech Australia. Prior to Athena I founded nabtrade, NAB’s digital investing platform, and led the business from initial idea through to delivering Australia’s best investing experience. Experienced in leading businesses through the full cycle of start-up, scale and maturation, I understand the dynamics of taking a vision to successful execution in complex, regulated environments.
organization_description_1: The big banks are definitely having a lend… locking borrowers into a life sentence, charging them for sneezing, and giving 0% interest in treating customers like people. We know, we used to work for them.  Enter Athena, the Game-Changing Goddess of Good Stuff. She spoke to us (well it was more of a roasting) and talked of a brighter future where people could be freed of their mortgage handcuffs.  “It’s not about getting a home loan, it’s about getting rid of a £#!*ing home loan!”  She was right. We did the sums, and worked out that without the big bank costs and complications, and by creating our own ground-breaking tech platform that enables us to bypass the banks to access new methods of funding, then we actually could slice a pretty huge chunk of time and money off the life of the loan.  Finding a short-cut to financial freedom, Athena’s vision is now a reality. Now you can enjoy a home loan with a whole new level of service, speed and savings.

organization_description_1: ZeroDois pela Educação é uma comunidade do ecossistema empreendedor com o objetivo de destravar uma alavanca fundamental ao desenvolvimento do país, a educação pública. Queremos criar um Brasil onde todos os quase 38 milhões de alunos no ensino público tenham educação de qualidade. Hoje, menos de 5% terminam o ensino médio com aprendizagem adequada de matemática e português. Convidamos fundadores e investidores de venture capital (VCs) a serem membros doadores, que se comprometem a doar pelo menos 0,2% de seus ganhos ou carry respectivamente, e juntar esforços e recursos a serem alocados em projetos de alto impacto. Nosso objetivo é oferecer uma doação de fácil adesão, mas com resultados ambiciosos, para que fundadores e investidores de VC possam vencer um obstáculo importante no desenvolvimento do país.

headline: On a mission to reinvent business payments through AI.
summary: I’m a fintech entrepreneur passionate about transforming how businesses move and manage money.  For the past eight years, I led PayMee, a company I founded and grew into one of Brazil’s most recognized digital payment platforms — an experience that shaped my vision of how technology, trust, and regulation must evolve together to drive financial innovation.  Today, I’m entering a new chapter — focused on building intelligent financial infrastructure powered by data, automation, and artificial intelligence.  My journey blends hands-on product building with deep expertise in compliance, payments, and scalable architecture. I’m driven by the challenge of turning complex financial systems into simple, human-centered experiences.  I believe the future of financial services will be real-time, AI-native, and borderless — and I’m dedicated to helping shape that transformation.
position_description_1: My role is centered on establishing Supago as the premier AI-focused Payment Service Provider (PSP) in the Argentine B2B market: * Vision & Product Strategy: Defined the core product vision, positioning Supago as a PSP that uses proprietary AI agents to deliver maximum efficiency, not just transaction processing. * Operational Automation: Led the design and implementation of an AI-first operational model, leveraging internal AI agents to automate core tasks across all internal departments (Finance, Compliance, HR), ensuring maximum operational efficiency with a reduced team. * Fundraising & Investor Relations: Secured initial seed funding and managed strategic communications with investors, articulating the high-growth potential of an AI-native PSP in the Latam market. * Talent Acquisition: Built a lean, high-performing founding team focused on AI development, financial compliance, and local market expertise.
position_description_2: PayMee is a leading Brazilian fintech, recognized as one of the largest providers of Pix in the country. We offer a secure online payment method with real-time transaction confirmation, facilitating e-commerce sales for consumers who prefer to pay using Pix, Pix in Installments, internet banking from their respective banks or with cash. With our extensive support for Pix, the instant payment system launched by the Central Bank of Brazil, we enable even faster and more efficient transactions, setting the standard for digital payments in Brazil.
position_description_3: As the Director of Operations (COO) of SafetyPay, I was responsible for overseeing the company's daily operations and ensuring the efficient execution of its strategic goals. My role involved:  Operational Leadership: Directing and coordinating all operational activities across the organization to ensure seamless performance and high-quality service delivery. Process Optimization: Identifying and addressing operational inefficiencies, implementing process improvements, and leveraging technology to enhance productivity and reduce costs. Team Management: Leading and mentoring a diverse team of professionals, fostering a culture of accountability, continuous improvement, and high performance. Customer Experience: Enhancing the customer experience by ensuring the reliability and security of payment processing services, addressing customer concerns, and maintaining high satisfaction levels. Partnerships and Collaboration: Building and maintaining strong relationships with banks, financial institutions, and other key partners to expand the company's reach and capabilities. Innovation and Growth: Driving innovation in payment solutions and services, staying ahead of industry trends, and identifying new market opportunities to sustain long-term growth.  By effectively managing these responsibilities, I contributed to SafetyPay's operational success and its reputation as a reliable and innovative payment solutions provider.

summary: Helping Web3 companies find the right people to grow their teams. Since 2021, I’ve been focused on connecting great companies in blockchain and Web3 with the people they need to succeed. I run Chain Reaction, my independent recruitment and headhunting brand, built on commitment, respect, and transparency. I work closely with clients worldwide, taking the pressure off their hiring process by managing the search and initial interviews with precision. I cover everything from executive roles to entry-level positions, for both tech and non-tech teams. Whatever your hiring needs, I can help you build a team that drives growth and innovation. (Chain Reaction Recruiters LTD SC788785)
organization_description_2: Crypto Recruit is the world's first Recruitment/Talent Acquisition agency specializing in recruiting exclusively within the Blockchain | Web3 and Cryptocurrency space. Its founders have a combined total of 30 years recruitment experience.  We focus on recruiting across all disciplines within Defi(Decentralised Finance), Gamefi (Blockchain Gaming/Metaverse Projects), Layer 1 and 2 Solutions across (Ethereum, Solana, Cardano, Polygon, Arbitrum, Fantom, Polkadot), Non Fungible Tokens(NFT’s) ZKRollups and other areas that involve crypto specific talent.  Our team are located across the globe and all of our consultants have an intimate knowledge of the Blockchain landscape and more importantly are heavily networked within the industry. When you work with Cryptorecruit you get much more than  just a search and selection service – you get a holistic view of the Crypto landscape along with nuanced understanding of each sector. We are uniquely positioned to source top talent for our clients and are passionate about the pivotal role we play in this ever evolving industry.  Check out our website: www.cryptorecruit.com
organization_description_3: I set up TSMTY in September 2018 in order to program and execute a tour of Bali in Indonesia for my absolute favourite story telling theatre production, Orpheus, which when I saw it for the first time touched me so deeply and filled up my heart that I wanted to strive to live a bigger life and be a better human.   How I came to tour this glorious, award winning show to Bali is a whole other story, divinely inspired of course.   After a lot of hard work and an enormous learning curve, the tour was a success and the process of doing it unlocked lots of new opportunities over there, and also in the Uk.   The name They Sent Me to You came from a fictional conversation I had with my beautiful Bali dog Chulie, when she struggled in my gate in 2014 looking for love and friendship. In the conversation I told her that I didn’t have time for her but she just looked convinced that we were supposed to be together and she said “but they sent me to you”. I knew nothing about looking after stray dogs but years on she has proven to be an absolute godsend in my life. It turned out that I needed her just as much as she needed me.   The shows I want to produce will have that feel about them, like a godsend you didn’t know you needed. Something that captures your heart and changes you forever. Something that makes you laugh and stirs you at your very core, reminding you that there is something bigger and great than us always taking care of things.   If you would like me to know about your performances with a view to showing them in Glasgow or Bali, or if you’d like to know more about what I do, or you’d like my help on your events either liaising with artists, running your box office, managing your guest list, helping with online ticket sales, or promotion through Facebook and Instagram, please get in touch.   #flawedbyyourpower  Marnie x
position_description_3: Founder and producer of touring and local Theatre, Music, Spoken Word events || Bali || Scotland Touring international theatre and storytelling performances to Bali, Indonesia. Started in 2018 by working with York based Grainger and Wright on their the multi award winning show “Orpheus - a Tale of Ancient Gods and Late Night Karaoke” to create a tour of Bali with 10 ticketed performances. We like small, low tech shows that have depth and meaning that change the way we see and feel. The long vision behind this company is to work towards creating an international theatre and performance festival in Bali. In the meantime we are working on small TSMTY events in Glasgow. Over the years we have provided on site services such as box office management, artist liaison, ticket and merchandise sales to some well loved local music events such as Melting Pot, Electric Frog/Riverside Festival, and Playgrounds of Sound. We also we partners in a 3 year run of Fusion - a successful club night at The Renfrew Ferry and the Riverside Club. marnie@theysentmetoyou.co.uk +447447848480

headline: Strategic Advisor & Investor | Bitcoin Since 2013 | Columbia MBA | HBS Alumni | Former LVMH | YPO
summary: Strategic advisor helping companies navigate Bitcoin treasury strategy and institutional digital asset opportunities. My Bitcoin journey: Bitcoin investor since 2013, when I first used it to solve a real problem, sending money to family in Venezuela during currency controls. That experience shaped my conviction that sound money matters. Since then, I've helped guide over 20 projects to a combined market capitalization exceeding $15 billion. Currently Strategic Advisor to DigitalX (ASX: DCC), Australia's largest listed Bitcoin company. Prior to digital assets, I worked at LVMH. Relocated to Puerto Rico in 2023. Columbia MBA, Harvard Business School alumni. YPO member. Building at the intersection of institutional finance and Bitcoin.
position_description_1: DigitalX Limited (ASX:DCC, OTCQB: DGGFX) is pleased to announce the formal establishment of its Strategic Advisory Board with the appointment of globally recognised digital asset leaders Yat Siu of Animoca Brands and Hervé Larren of Airvey.io.  Following the Company’s announcement on 8 July 2025, both Yat Siu and Hervé Larren have now executed advisory agreements with DigitalX to join its Strategic Advisory Board and support its strategic direction. The Strategic Advisory Board will provide ongoing guidance to the Board and executive team on global digital asset market trends, strategic partnerships, capital market opportunities and long-term positioning of the Company’s Bitcoin-first treasury strategy.
position_description_2: Advises organization on key opportunities.   Animoca Brands is a leading investor in Web3, with a portfolio of over 540 companies, including names such as Yuga Labs, Axie Infinity, Polygon, Consensys, Magic Eden, OpenSea, Dapper Labs, Yield Guild Games, and many more.  Based in Hong Kong, it is now positioned as the largest fund in the sector. Its financial portfolio includes $172 million in cash, $330 million in third-party tokens, and $1.6 billion in off-balance sheet token reserves.
position_description_3: Strategic advisor and investor specializing in institutional digital asset strategy, Bitcoin treasury management and tax-optimized fund structures.  Advisory Clients: - DigitalX (ASX-listed, Australia's first Bitcoin treasury company) - RR Donnelley (NYSE: RRD, Fortune 500) - Animoca Brands ($2B+ valuation) - Horizen Labs (ApeCoin creator; Special Council of DAO) - Xsolla (leading global video game payments platform) - E11EVEN Captain's Club (hospitality/entertainment)  Notable Work: - Co-author of ApeChain with Steven Goldfeder, Co-Founder of Arbitrum  Investment Portfolio (Pre-Listing): - Grayscale (GDLC, ZCSH, MANA, HZEN) - Nakamoto Holdings ($710M PIPE, largest crypto-related PIPE in history)

headline: Entrepreneur | Angel Investor, Fintechs & Real Estate
summary: Desde 2010, minha trajetória tem sido dedicada a impulsionar negócios na indústria imobiliária e ecossistemas de inovação e tecnologia.Contribuí para a construção das operações brasileiras das gigantes do mercado imobiliário Century 21 e RE/MAX Brasil e do maior marketplace da América Latina, o Grupo ZAP - vendido em 2020 para o Grupo OLX por US$ 660 MM, a segunda maior transação de startups no Brasil. Além disso, participei da construção da Nomad, um banco digital global em dólares focado em brasileiros, onde permaneço como advisor.Minha missão é clara: apoiar negócios inovadores no crescimento e na geração de impacto, seja como investidor ou conselheiro estratégico. Atualmente, faço parte do conselho da CashBanx, Plaza (IA para imobiliárias), da Lugui AI (automatização de processos imobiliários) e OXUS Finance (plataforma de agregador de stablecoin).Em 2025, retornei às minhas duas casas: RE/MAX e Belo Horizonte, com o objetivo de unir inovação, tecnologia, inteligência artificial e franchising para transformar o mercado imobiliário mineiro. Com a aquisição parcial e uma abordagem end-to-end na Master Franquia da RE/MAX em Minas, além do meu retorno ao captable da RE/MAX Brasil, meu foco é acelerar processos, criar valor e desenvolver projetos que gerem impacto real na vida das pessoas. Estou determinado a destravar o crescimento das imobiliárias no meu estado e posicioná-las nesse mercado altamente competitivo, tanto no ambiente digital quanto no tradicional.

headline: Founder @Atom AI | Multiple Entrepreneur, Board Member, Angel Investor, Uber OG
summary: There are few things that excite me more than building something from scratch. I was lucky to be able to spend hours in my dad's office playing with the first IBM personal computers at the age of 12. And from then on when I look back at every school essay about 'what you want to be in 10 years time', my reply was a tech entrepreneur. I have always been ambitious and wanted my results to speak for me, not just my network. With time I learned that network is just as important as achievements, and that my failures are probably what has made me grow the most. On this profile I try to share a bit about myself, what drives me, my startups and I am not afraid to stand up for what is wrong or unjust.
organization_description_1: Atom is an AI-driven system that connects companies with patented innovations from the world’s top inventors.  We help businesses find and license ready-to-use technologies for free, while giving inventors a space to share their work and reach new partners.  Our goal is simple: make it easier for great ideas to find the people who can bring them to life.
position_description_1: On a mission to connect breakthrough ideas with the people who can turn them into real impact. Atom makes the path from discovering IP to securing it fast, simple, and reliable. The result is clear access to patented technologies that keep companies competitive and help them innovate with confidence.
organization_description_2: Kharis Capital is a private equity firm that drives continued growth and innovation in consumer businesses through long-term direct investment partnerships.   Aristotle defined Kharis as the altruistic feeling that moves us to do something for one another - a sense of purpose, of caring, of giving back that drives our world to seek improvement.   This motivation is at the very heart of Kharis Capital.
position_description_2: An active investor in Food & Consumer Tech, Kharis Capital has been tracking the fundamental transformation of the food industry spurred by an ever-growing number of innovative foodtech companies. headline: Co-Founder & COO at Tradoo AG | Non Custodial Digital Asset Management
summary: Jens Herbst ist ein leidenschaftlicher Unternehmer, Dozent und Keynote-Speaker mit über 15 Jahren Erfahrung im digitalen Business. Er gründete und leitete die Agentur schweiz-design.ch, die über 50 Top-Rankings bei Google erzielte und Kunden wie H&M, Marriott Group und Harley Davidson betreute. Nach dem Exit 2018 verschrieb er sich vollständig der Blockchain-Technologie.  Als Gründer der WeSendit Media AG treibt Jens seit 2018 die Entwicklung sicherer, dezentraler Datentransferlösungen voran. Die Plattform zählt heute über 3,5 Millionen Nutzer in 150+ Ländern. Mit WeSendit 3.0, lanciert 2024 in Partnerschaft mit Huawei Cloud, Storj und Unigrid, schafft er eine zukunftsfähige Web3-Infrastruktur. Ergänzend dazu berät Jens Web3-Unternehmen in den Bereichen ICO, Compliance und Tokenstrategie.  Neben seiner Tech-Tätigkeit engagiert sich Jens stark im sozial verantwortungsvollen Wohnbereich. Über seine mobile Verwaltungsstruktur BoVita Herbst stellt er Studierenden sowie Berufseinsteigern aus Deutschland in der Schweiz bezahlbaren Wohnraum zur Verfügung – inklusive Rundum-Service bei administrativen, versicherungstechnischen und behördlichen Themen (Aufenthaltsrecht, Haftpflicht etc.). Ziel ist eine praxisnahe Entlastung junger Menschen beim Start in Studium oder Beruf.  Als privater Immobilieninvestor entwickelt er moderne Wohnkonzepte in urbanen Räumen – rechtssicher, effizient und digital verwaltet. Damit leistet er einen aktiven Beitrag zur Bekämpfung der Wohnraumknappheit in der Schweiz.  Seit 2025 baut Jens ausserdem die Plattform Tradoo auf – die weltweit erste AI-basierte Web3-Vermögensverwaltung, die DeFi - Index Strategien, Real-World-Assets, Entnahmepläne und automatisierte Kapitalallokation kombiniert. Ziel ist eine benutzerfreundliche, regulatorisch konforme Lösung für den globalen Markt. organization_description_3: A Confederação Nacional da Indústria (CNI) é a representante da indústria brasileira. É o órgão máximo do sistema sindical patronal da indústria e, desde a sua fundação, em 1938, defende os interesses da indústria nacional e atua na articulação com os poderes Executivo, Legislativo e Judiciário, além de diversas entidades e organismos no Brasil e no exterior.  Representa 27 federações de indústrias e 1.250 sindicatos patronais, aos quais são filiadas quase 700 mil indústrias. Administra diretamente o Serviço Social da Indústria (SESI), o Serviço Nacional de Aprendizagem Industrial (SENAI) e o Instituto Euvaldo Lodi (IEL). Com eles, compõe o Sistema Indústria, que congrega ainda as federações estaduais de indústrias e os sindicatos patronais.   Desde que surgiu, exerce um papel de vanguarda na sociedade, promovendo o debate e buscando consensos em torno dos grandes temas nacionais, sobretudo os que têm impacto sobre o desempenho da indústria e da economia brasileira.  Importante interlocutora no cenário nacional, a CNI, que tem sede em Brasília e um escritório de representação em São Paulo, discute e apresenta sugestões para a construção e o aperfeiçoamento de políticas e leis que fortaleçam o setor produtivo e modernizem o país.  Contatos: imprensa@cni.org.br +55 (61) 3317-9578  Política de uso: https://bit.ly/PoliticaDeUsoDaCNI

headline: CEO do Rede Frota & FrotaBank | Transformação de Negócios & Turnaround | Inovação em Pagamentos e Digital | PGA – Fundação Dom Cabral | Executive Education - INSEAD
summary: Minha trajetória tem mais de uma década dedicada a escalar negócios, reverter operações e mobilizar equipes para resultados extraordinários.  Comecei em produtos no Unibanco, Banco ABC Brasil e Porto Seguro, mas em 2012 migrei para a área comercial — e nunca mais voltei atrás. No Mercado Pago, como Head Comercial, liderei a expansão de R$ 1 milhão/mês para R$ 265 milhões/mês em cinco anos. Esse divisor de águas consolidou meu estilo: processos sólidos + equipes de alta performance + metas ousadas.  Na Braspag (Grupo Cielo), reverti uma queda anual de 12% para crescimento de 28% em 2019 e 45% em 2020, transformando um turnaround em case interno. Depois, na Cielo, em apenas 16 meses, reestruturei operações que devolveram a empresa às carteiras de investidores. Em 2022, no Grupo Jovem Pan, entreguei o maior resultado financeiro em 80 anos: +57% de crescimento.  Mais recentemente, como CEO da Jaé, liderei a transformação da bilhetagem eletrônica no Rio de Janeiro: outorga de R$ 110 milhões, super app em milhões de celulares e o único cartão multi-application  do mercado. Do zero, construí cultura, operação e um modelo de negócios que despertou o interesse de líderes de mercado.  Acredito que resultados sustentáveis nascem de culturas fortes. Em todas as minhas lideranças, formei times de alta performance baseados em protagonismo, eficiência inteligente e espírito de dono.  Hoje, como CEO do Rede Frota & FrotaBank, sigo meu propósito: transformar ideias em resultados tangíveis, com legitimidade, visão estratégica e impacto positivo em pessoas, negócios e sociedade.  Especialidades: Transformação de negócios, turnaround, escalabilidade, fintechs, mobilidade, pagamentos e liderança de equipes de alta performance.

summary: Profissional renomado, com mais de 25 anos de experiência e uma carreira que abrange liderança estratégica no setor privado, na academia e na administração pública. Atualmente, atuo como Head Global de Práticas Multissetoriais, Administração Pública e Práticas SAP na Qintess, uma empresa líder em Advanced Analytics, Inteligência Artificial, Indústria 5.0 e soluções SAP, operando em mais de 14 países. Na Qintess, fui peça fundamental na expansão global da empresa, integrando tecnologias como SAP Digital Manufacturing e SAP Signavio, além de fortalecer parcerias com players estratégicos como SAP, Google, AWS, SAS, OutSystems e Mendix. Meu trabalho tem impulsionado transformações inovadoras no governo e em setores como varejo, automotivo, energia, agronegócio, saúde e mineração.  Além da minha atuação no setor privado, contribuo para a inovação no setor público como Membro do Conselho Consultivo da ADETEC – Agência de Desenvolvimento Energético e Tecnológico, com foco no avanço da energia sustentável e na transformação digital no Sul do Brasil. Minha atuação estratégica apoia iniciativas de descarbonização e promove a inovação regional alinhada aos objetivos globais de sustentabilidade.  Como Membro do Conselho Consultivo do COSUD – Consórcio de Integração Sul-Sudeste do Brasil, trabalho para fomentar a colaboração entre os estados dessas regiões, apoiando projetos voltados para a modernização da infraestrutura, o fortalecimento da inovação tecnológica e a integração econômica regional.  No SaberTec – Parque Tecnológico, atuo como conselheiro na criação de um polo de inovação e desenvolvimento tecnológico, conectando academia e indústria para impulsionar a pesquisa e a comercialização de novas tecnologias. Minhas contribuições consolidam o SaberTec como um motor do crescimento econômico regional.  Anteriormente, fui Vice-Presidente na Indra Minsait, onde liderei projetos de administração pública, saúde pública e privada, transporte e defesa. headline: CEO / CRO @ Vertigo | Digital Intelligence & AI for Enterprise IT | Digital Transformation, Cloud & API Strategy
industry: Atividades dos serviços de tecnologia da informação
summary: As CEO and CRO at Vertigo, I lead organizations through complex digital transformation challenges where technology alone is not enough. Along this journey, I realized that most initiatives fail not because of tools, but due to the lack of direction, integration, and execution capability. Cloud, APIs, data, and now AI have become priorities but without strategy and governance, they only add more complexity.  Throughout my career, I have been directly involved in designing and executing digital transformation programs, architecture modernization, critical systems integration, and digital platform adoption for large enterprises and regulated industries. Always at the intersection of technology, business, and risk, where poor decisions are costly.  At Vertigo, I lead initiatives that connect Digital Intelligence, AI, Cloud, APIs, and Platform Engineering to solve real business problems. We have already supported more than 50 clients and delivered over 500 projects, helping organizations accelerate time-to-market without losing control, modernize legacy systems without disrupting operations, and scale digital channels with security and predictability.  Our focus is not technology for its own sake, but measurable and sustainable impact. We work from strategy through execution, ensuring every initiative has a clear purpose, coherent architecture, and governance from day one.  I work closely with CIOs, IT Directors, and digital leaders who must deliver results in high-pressure environments with multiple stakeholders and regulatory constraints. My technical background, combined with an execution-oriented executive mindset, allows me to bridge board-level strategy, business priorities, and engineering teams, translating complexity into clear decisions.  If you’re facing challenges around digital transformation, technology modernization, or enterprise-scale AI adoption, I’m always open to exchanging perspectives. Feel free to reach out.  #FlyYourBusiness

headline: CFG | Expandindo o mercado de capitais sob regulação BACEN/CVM
location_name: Porto Alegre, Rio Grande do Sul, Brazil
summary: Atuo na expansão do mercado de capitais brasileiro, com foco em criar pontes sólidas entre empresas, investidores e reguladores. No CFG Group e na captable, lidero iniciativas que unem inovação, governança e disciplina — sempre em alinhamento com a regulação do BACEN e da CVM. Desde 2019, participo ativamente da evolução do ecossistema de crowdfunding e de alternativas de investimento, ajudando a construir: - a maior base de clientes, empresas e investidores do setor, - novas estruturas e produtos financeiros, - e referências de transparência e profissionalismo reconhecidas pelo mercado. Meu propósito é claro: fortalecer a confiança no mercado de capitais, ampliando o acesso a oportunidades para investidores e empresas, com visão de longo prazo e consistência.
organization_description_1: Apoiamos empresas no acesso a instrumentos financeiros que antes estavam restritos a grandes corporações.  Desenhamos soluções sob medida, junto a parceiros regulados – instituição financeira autorizada pelo Bacen, securitizadora e plataforma registrada na CVM – para que empresas possam operar como verdadeiros "mini bancos".  Nosso trabalho tem como foco três pilares:  • Governança e conformidade: estruturas sólidas, seguras e juridicamente defensáveis. • Eficiência e autonomia: menos intermediários, mais controle sobre o ciclo do capital. • Autoridade técnica: presença em marcos regulatórios como CVM 88, BCB 5050 e Sandbox Regulatório.  Com mais de 14 anos de atuação no mercado financeiro, já estruturamos operações relevantes para empresas de diferentes setores, sempre respeitando o momento de cada negócio e seus objetivos estratégicos.  📌 Nossa missão é clara: ser referência em estruturar soluções financeiras inteligentes para empresas de pequeno e médio porte no Brasil, conectando governança, tecnologia e mercado de capitais.
organization_location_1: Porto Alegre, Rio Grande do Sul, Brazil
position_description_1: À frente da operação do CFGroup, liderando a execução estratégica, a eficiência operacional e a expansão das soluções financeiras estruturadas do grupo.

Regidos pela CVM, nossa missão é simplificar e viabilizar investimentos, alavancando o crescimento de negócios promissores e proporcionando grandes retornos para os investidores.  Na vanguarda do mercado de Investment Banking, democratizamos, sob regulação do Banco Central, a emissão de Certificados de Recebíveis, CRIs e CRAs, antes restritos a grandes instituições e fundos.  O que já fizemos até aqui:  •⁠  ⁠+R$ 540 milhões investidos no ecossistema de startups e investimentos alternativos. •⁠  ⁠+9 mil investidores ativos.  •⁠  ⁠+100 captações concluídas.

headline: CFP® · Planejador Financeiro | Ajudo executivos e empresários a transformar renda alta em independência financeira real | Arquitetura Patrimonial · Brasil e exterior · BTG Pactual
location_name: São Bernardo do Campo, São Paulo, Brasil
summary: A maioria dos desafios financeiros não nasce da falta de dinheiro, mas de decisões tomadas em contextos complexos, muitas vezes sob pressão, incerteza e sem clareza. Meu propósito é ajudar pessoas e empresas a transformarem decisões financeiras em projetos de vida sustentáveis, viáveis e alinhados com seus valores.  São mais de 26 anos de experiência dedicados a gerar soluções personalizadas para clientes, parceiros comerciais e para a sociedade. Ao longo dessa trajetória, atuei em cenários reais e de alta responsabilidade, onde decisões financeiras impactam famílias, empresas e futuros inteiros. Há mais de 14 anos atuo como Planejador Financeiro Pessoal, certificado com o CFP®, certificação máxima da área, que carrego como compromisso ético com visão de longo prazo e responsabilidade fiduciária.  Sou um aprendiz de longa data. Integro minha experiência técnica no mercado financeiro, no planejamento financeiro pessoal e em investimentos com conhecimentos em finanças comportamentais, psicologia, neurociência e filosofia, entendendo que dinheiro raramente é apenas um problema matemático — ele passa, antes, pelas emoções, crenças e decisões humanas.  Na IntegraAliança Invest, atuo de forma sinérgica no crescimento e na expansão patrimonial dos clientes. Nossa equipe oferece soluções de investimento customizadas, alinhadas ao perfil e aos objetivos de cada investidor, tendo o Banco BTG Pactual como sócio estratégico. Atuamos como um hub de soluções financeiras para pessoas físicas e jurídicas, com foco em consistência, proteção e construção de valor ao longo do tempo.  Como CEO da Ivan Vianna Finanças Pessoais e Empresariais, aplico meu conhecimento em Planejamento Financeiro Pessoal, Investimentos e Educação Financeira para servir vidas e viabilizar sonhos e projetos. Acredito que o verdadeiro sucesso financeiro se constrói com base em relações de longo prazo, confiança mútua e transparência.  Atuei — e atuo — no planejamento e construção de patrimônio de clientes de alta renda, private banking, HNW e Ultra High Net Worth, incluindo holdings patrimoniais, bem como junto a Single e Multi Family Offices, no Brasil e no exterior. Também atuo na realidade corporativa, apoiando empresas na gestão estratégica de caixa, liquidez, crédito, financiamentos, M&A, reestruturações financeiras e soluções estruturadas no mercado nacional e internacional.  27 anos dedicados a organizar decisões financeiras em um mundo complexo, ajudando pessoas, famílias e empresas a construírem não apenas patrimônio, mas estabilidade, clareza e futuro.

headline: Diretor Geral | Presidente | Country Manager | Board Member | Advisor
summary: Hi, I’m Erick and I have a challenge: every time I engage with a digital interface, whether a website, app or social platform, I see an opportunity to reimagine it as a customer experience worth remembering. That perspective has guided my career and fuels my passion for technology as a driver of better customer experiences, greater efficiency, and sustainable business growth. Today, I lead the Brazilian operation of Botmaker, one of the largest Conversational AI platforms in Latin America and a top BSP partner of Meta. Our mission is to help enterprises transform the way they interact, serve, and sell to their customers through AI agents and chatbots, creating interactions that are continuous, impactful, and scalable. Over the last 15 years, I’ve held senior leadership roles at Oracle, SAP, Salesforce, and VTEX, guiding companies through expansion, innovation, and large-scale transformations. At VTEX, I was part of the leadership team that expanded the enterprise customer base in Brazil and contributed to preparing the company for its IPO on the NYSE. I also served as General Manager at Yalo, a Mexican company focused on conversational commerce, leading the go-to-market execution in Brazil. In parallel, I act as an advisor, board member, and angel investor, supporting high-growth companies such as Ploomes (CRM SaaS, acquired by Sankhya) and Pagaleve (BNPL fintech), helping them scale and shape the future of technology in Latin America. At the core, my leadership is built on three pillars: innovation, people, and measurable results. I believe the next chapter of digital transformation belongs to Conversational AI, and I’m committed to making that future a reality.
organization_description_1: Botmaker é uma empresa de tecnologia que permite criar e gerenciar bots para a automação de vendas, atendimento ao cliente e operações de help desk interno. Além disso, é WhatsApp Solution Provider.
position_description_1: Leading the Brazilian operation of Botmaker, one of the largest Conversational AI platforms in Latin America and a top BSP partner of Meta. Botmaker is a leader in chatbots and AI agents, helping companies transform the way they interact, serve, and sell to their customers through messaging, voice, and automation. In Brazil, I am focused on expanding the enterprise customer base, strengthening brand awareness in the region, and creating a strong partner ecosystem to drive accelerated growth and consolidate Botmaker’s leadership in the market.
organization_description_2: A Pagaleve é uma empresa pioneira em Buy Now Pay Later no Brasil.  Somos altamente alavancados por tecnologia e análises avançadas, e trazemos uma nova e impactante forma para consumidores conseguirem parcelar as suas compras sem depender de cartões de crédito, e de suas altas taxas de juros.  Além de ser uma grande aliada do consumidor, a Pagaleve suporta também os varejistas, trazendo uma nova forma de pagamento que impacta significativamente no aumento das vendas e na redução de custos transacionais.  A Pagaleve foi fundada em 2021 e conta com uma trajetória acelerada de crescimento, com o suporte de investidores de peso, como Salesforce Ventures, Banco do Brasil/ MSW,  OIF Ventures, Founder Collective, Entrée Capital, Endeavor ScaleUp, Janeiro Energy, entre outros.
position_description_2: Pagaleve is a Brazilian fintech founded in 2021, specialized in “Pix Parcelado,” a Buy Now, Pay Later (BNPL) solution that allows consumers to split payments via Pix, without the need for a credit card. The company quickly scaled, partnering with major retailers, helping them increase sales conversion and average ticket size while eliminating risks like chargebacks and defaults. As an Executive Advisor and Partner, I have supported Pagaleve’s strategic growth and expansion.
organization_description_3: Sistema de automação da força de vendas.  CRM, Funil de vendas, Automação de Propostas e Pedidos de Vendas em um só lugar!
position_description_3: Part of Ploomes from its creation as an early-phase angel investor and partner, supporting the company’s strategic direction and initial growth. Ploomes evolved to become one of Brazil’s leading CRM SaaS companies, centralizing the customer journey, automating proposals and workflows, and integrating with ERPs to provide a complete platform for commercial management. In 2022, Ploomes was acquired by Sankhya, one of Brazil’s top ERP companies, as part of its strategy to build an integrated ecosystem of enterprise solutions. Within this ecosystem, Ploomes plays a key role as the CRM company, complementing Sankhya’s vision of delivering an end-to-end Enterprise Intelligence Platform for businesses.

organization_description_1: O TECHOÁ é um hub de inovação privado criado para impulsionar a cocriação soluções digitais que transformem os desafios de sustentabilidade em novas oportunidades de negócio. Com o apoio da FINEP e fundado pelo CPQD e Inventta, conectamos corporações, startups, ICTs, academia, agentes públicos e investidores para viabilizar soluções tecnológicas para gerar impacto real nos negócios e na sociedade.  Diferente de outros hubs, que se limitam a coworking, eventos, matchmaking e programas de aceleração, o TECHOÁ se destaca por atuar ativamente na estruturação e execução de Projetos de Inovação e Impacto, conduzindo cada etapa do processo: • Busca ativa de desafios reais do mercado e da sociedade • Definição de escopo para garantir soluções estratégicas e eficazes • Conexão com os melhores solucionadores – startups, pesquisadores e especialistas • Identificação e captação de recursos para viabilizar os projetos • Gestão e acompanhamento (PMO) para garantir entregas de valor • Medição dos impactos para avaliar os resultados concretos  Se sua empresa possui objetivos desafiadores em relação a sustentabilidade e busca inovação com impacto real nos negócios e na sociedade, o TECHOÁ é o espaço certo para transformar esses desafios em oportunidades.  Faça parte dessa jornada. Seja um membro do TECHOÁ! summary: I’m a product leader who builds data and platform-driven products at scale, with experience across hyperscale technology, high-growth startups, and regulated healthcare. summary: Empresas de alto crescimento são o motor da economia.  Mas negócios não crescem sozinhos.  Escalar exige estratégia, liderança, tecnologia, pessoas e acesso à capital.  Em 13 anos na Ambev, onde comecei como vendedora e, em 10 anos, me tornei sócia, aprendi na prática os princípios que fazem as grandes empresas se tornarem cada vez maiores. Como People Director, liderei times diversos, conduzi projetos de aceleração da liderança feminina e ajudei a transformar cultura em alavanca de performance.  Na Educbank, fintech que co-fundei, vivi o desafio e a conquista de escalar um negócio do zero.  Participei do processo de expansão da fintech, que recebeu aporte de R$ 158 milhões da Vasta Educação, braço do grupo Cogna. Hoje, lidero iniciativas voltadas à inovação e desenvolvimento de soluções educacionais. Mais do que o crescimento da empresa, o que me moveu foi o impacto gerado na vida de quem educa e transforma futuros todos os dias.  Sou apaixonada por ajudar a construir negócios escaláveis e tenho o privilégio de hoje compartilhar meu repertório e vivências com líderes e empreendedores que estão construindo seus próprios caminhos de crescimento.  Atuo como mentora em iniciativas como G4 Educação, Instituto Ismart e Learn to Fly, apoiando quem quer evoluir com propósito e escala. Sou formada em Relações Públicas pela Faculdade Cásper Líbero, com MBA em Marketing pela FGV e especializações em Neurociência e Comportamento (PUCRS) e em Product Management pela PM3.

organization_description_1: ACI Worldwide, an original innovator in global payments technology, delivers transformative software solutions that power intelligent payments orchestration in real time so banks, billers, and merchants can drive growth, while continuously modernizing their payment infrastructures, simply and securely. With nearly 50 years of trusted payments expertise, we combine our global footprint with a local presence to offer enhanced payment experiences to stay ahead of constantly changing payment challenges and opportunities.     In short, we’re helping banks, merchants and billers capture rising real-time opportunities and volumes, all to meet the shifting needs of their consumers and business customers.
organization_description_2: FastPay is a technology company specializing in infrastructure for card solutions, created to support businesses that need to scale securely, efficiently, and quickly in a constantly transforming financial market.  It operates at the center of the payments ecosystem, connecting technological innovation, regulatory compliance, and high operational performance.  With cutting-edge technology and a robust architecture, it develops and operates complete card issuing, processing, and management solutions, highly customizable and adaptable to different business models, ranging from fintechs and banks to retail.  Its differentiator lies in the combination of technical flexibility, regulatory depth, and an agile time to market, which accelerates the transformation of ideas into reliable and scalable card products.  More than just processing transactions, FastPay helps its clients being more competitive, efficient and scale through card solutions that evolve with the market.  At FastPay, each card goes beyond technology: it represents trust, access, opportunities, and the future in motion

organization_description_3: A Superdigital é uma conta digital comprometida com o empoderamento econômico da população desbancarizada e semibancarizada da América Latina. No centro de sua estratégia estão o uso da tecnologia e a geração de economia e renda para esse público. Sua plataforma multipaíses, multilíngue e multimoedas - desenvolvida com código próprio e tecnologia nativa da nuvem - tem orientação mobile first e API first. No atendimento a pessoas físicas, a Superdigital oferece ferramentas simples e de uso intuitivo, com acesso a conta e cartão em poucos minutos, por meio de um processo de adesão 100% digital. E no segmento de banking as a service, a fintech atende empresas que precisam de soluções de pagamentos para a remuneração de funcionários e/ou oferta de benefícios, trazendo ganhos de eficiência para suas operações.  🌎 🌎 🌎   Superdigital es una cuenta digital comprometida con el empoderamiento económico de la población no bancarizada y semibancarizada de América Latina. En el centro de su estrategia están el uso de la tecnología y la generación de ahorro e ingresos para este público. Su plataforma multipaís, multiidioma y multimoneda, desarrollada con código propietario y tecnología nativa en la nube, tiene orientación mobile first y API first. En el servicio a personas físicas, Superdigital ofrece herramientas sencillas y de uso intuitivo, con acceso a cuenta y tarjeta en pocos minutos, mediante un proceso de suscripción 100% digital. Y en el segmento de banking as a service, la fintech apunta a empresas que necesitan de soluciones de pago para empleados y/u ofrecer beneficios, aportando eficiencia a sus operaciones.

organization_description_1: We are TrueChange, dedicated to helping organizations implement innovative solutions with a focus on creating value for their businesses. Operating throughout Brazil, our team of skilled professionals specializes in low-code and best practices in software development to drive digital transformation.  Since 2011, we’ve been Brazil’s leading low-code specialists, earning a reputation for excellence in implementation, training, specialized services, and the development of mobile and web solutions.  At TrueChange, we believe true change happens when we deliver exceptional experiences in solution creation and help our clients stay ahead in a competitive market.  Join us in shaping the future through low-code!  ___________    Somos a TrueChange e nos dedicamos a ajudar as organizações a implementar soluções inovadoras com foco na criação de valor para os seus negócios. Com atuação em todo o Brasil, contamos com uma equipe de profissionais qualificados e especializados em low-code e nas melhores práticas de desenvolvimento de software para realizar a transformação digital dos negócios.  Desde 2011, somos os maiores especialistas em low-code do Brasil, tendo nos tornado referência na implantação, treinamento, serviços especializados e no desenvolvimento de soluções mobile e web.  Aqui, acreditamos que a verdadeira mudança é quando proporcionamos uma experiência diferenciada na criação de soluções, e quando contribuímos para aumentar a competitividade dos nossos clientes.  Vem com a gente digitalizar o mundo através do low-code!
