headline: CTO
organization_description_1: O Grupo Barigüi é o maior revendedor de veículos novos e seminovos do Sul do Brasil. Desde a sua fundação em 1993, o Grupo Barigüi já comercializou mais de 01 milhão de veículos nos Estados do Paraná e Santa Catarina. Trabalhamos com as seguintes marcas: Ford, Fiat, Jeep, Nissan, Hyundai, Toyota, Lexus, Citroën, KIA, Volkswagen, Renault, BMW, Mini, Chery, Omoda, Audi, Jaecoo, BMW Motorrad, BYD, Geely, BRP, GAC e DAF Caminhões.  E olhar para o futuro de forma cada vez mais sustentável também faz parte da nossa essência. Através do Instituto Barigüi são realizadas mais de 1.000 coletas nas concessionárias e destinados mais de 525 toneladas de resíduos por ano. Toda a renda gerada pelos resíduos é revertida em bolsas de estudos em cursos profissionalizantes para jovens de baixa renda.  E não paramos de pensar no futuro. Criamos o Banco Bari, um banco digital que nasce com o propósito de mudar a relação que o brasileiro tem com seu dinheiro, com soluções completas de conta, crédito e investimentos.  Grupo Barigüi, o futuro nos move.
organization_description_2: Somos uma empresa especializada em compra e venda de veículos seminovos com procedência e totalmente transparente. Oferecemos um mix de veículos de categorias variadas, com selos de procedência, garantia de 1 ano, todos submetidos a processos minuciosos de inspeção e controle de revisões. Além disso, oferecemos as melhores taxas de financiamento do mercado, ofertas de seguros com parceiros estratégicos e a flexibilidade do atendimento phygital.  Aqui você escolhe como quer ser atendido, nossos Mover’s sempre estarão prontos para te dar a melhor experiência!  Nascemos do  Grupo Barigui, o maior revendedor de veículos novos e seminovos do Sul do Brasil, com mais de 900 mil veículos comercializados nos Estados do Paraná e Santa Catarina, 30 anos de experiência no mercado automotivo, destaque no mercado financeiro com o Banco Bari e fundador do Instituto Barigüi, a Move surgiu a partir da necessidade de uma abordagem mais tecnológica, que une processos comerciais e operacionais descomplicados, transparência e procedência dos veículos. Seu propósito é revolucionar a mobilidade, oferecendo uma experiência moderna, única, ágil e econômica.  Oferecemos as melhores taxas de financiamento do mercado, parceiros estratégicos de seguros com as melhores ofertas, transparência em toda jornada de compra e venda e atendimento phygital.  A Barigui Move está transformando a maneira como as pessoas compram e vendem seus carros.

headline: Diretora Geral na Punto
summary: Com mais de 25 anos de experiência no setor financeiro, minha atual posição é como Diretora Geral da Punto, empresa de meios de pagamentos do grupo Edenred. Comecei minha carreira no Bank Boston, totalizando mais de 12 anos em vários departamentos como risco, crédito, produtos, BI e marketing. Na posição de diretora, trabalhei em diferentes países. Em 2006, iniciei minhas funções no Banco Santander e contribuí no desenvolvimento de produtos, relacionamento comercial e estratégias para empresas do varejo líderes na gestão em B2B e B2C, incluindo parcerias estratégicas para o negócio. Depois de liderar projetos importantes, assumi a vice-presidência de negócios e marketing da Getnet para impulsionar o crescimento da empresa em um mercado competitivo como o de meios de pagamentos. E história continuou …  Tenho habilidades de gestão de pessoas, buscando sempre o trabalho em equipe e equalizando as direções de todos. Ao longo da minha vida, já coordenei grandes equipes, incluindo equipes de líderes, tendo a gestão direta de mais de 300 pessoas. Sou bacharel em Economia pelo Mackenzie, com especialização em Finanças pela Insper em São Paulo. Sou fluente em português e inglês e atualmente estou estudando espanhol e francês. Gosto de me dedicar a projetos sociais, especialmente mentorando jovens, onde atuo por meio do Instituto Reciclar.
organization_description_1: A Edenred é a plataforma digital líder para serviços e meios de pagamento, que atua como a companhia diária para pessoas no trabalho, conectando mais de 60 milhões de usuários e mais de 2 milhões de comerciantes parceiros, em 45 países, por meio de 1 milhão de empresas-clientes.   No Brasil, sua atuação conta com três linhas de negócios: Benefícios e Engajamento, com a marca Ticket; Mobilidade, com as marcas Edenred Ticket Log, Edenred Repom e Taggy; e Soluções de Pagamento e Novos Mercados, com Edenred Pay e Punto. São mais de 130 mil empresas clientes, 8,5 milhões de empregados beneficiados e cerca de 800 mil comerciantes credenciados no País.   Fiel ao propósito do Grupo, “Enrich connections. For good”, essas soluções potencializam o bem-estar e o poder de compra dos usuários, melhoram a atratividade e a eficiência das empresas e dinamizam o mercado de trabalho e a economia local. Também promovem o acesso a alimentos mais saudáveis, produtos ambientalmente mais responsáveis e a uma mobilidade mais sustentável.   Os 12 mil funcionários da Edenred estão comprometidos em tornar o mundo do trabalho um ecossistema conectado mais seguro, eficiente e responsável, todos os dias.  Em 2024, graças aos seus ativos tecnológicos globais, o Grupo geriu aproximadamente €45 bilhões em volume de negócios, realizados principalmente por meio de aplicações móveis, plataformas online e cartões. Nós acreditamos que isso está errado.  Nosso propósito é devolver às empresas o protagonismo do seu ecossistema financeiro, permitindo que soluções bancárias, pagamentos e serviços financeiros reforcem a própria marca, a cultura e o vínculo com colaboradores, clientes e parceiros. Nossa visão é clara: toda empresa pode — e deve — ser dona da relação financeira que sustenta o seu negócio.  O nosso diferencial não é apenas tecnologia. É uma convicção: fornecedor não é marca. Infraestrutura não precisa de holofote.  A Biz fica nos bastidores. Construindo o palco. A relação, o valor e a marca ficam com quem realmente importa: o protagonista, que é a empresa.

headline: Regional Sales Manager - Latin America | Identity Security | ITDR/MFA/NHIs | Chair of the FAIR Institute Chapter in Brazil. Thunderbird University
summary: With over 20 years in the high-tech industry, I specialize in cyber and cloud security, identity and access management (IAM), ITDR, and SaaS solutions. At Silverfort, I lead regional sales operations across Latin America, fostering channel partnerships and driving sales growth. My contributions include generating a robust pipeline and advancing key Proof of Concepts (PoCs) in Brazil and Mexico.    I am dedicated to promoting digital safety and cybersecurity innovation in the region. As Chapter Chair of the FAIR Institute in Greater Brazil and a contributing writer for IT Mídia, I share insights on risk management, identity governance, and cybersecurity strategies. organization_description_1: Silverfort is on a mission to bring identity security everywhere, and allow organizations to operate without fear or disruptions. Fueled by a belief that enterprises and their identity teams deserve better, we found a way to break down the silos of identity security—eliminating the critical gaps and blind spots left behind by a patchwork of point solutions.  After years of research, we found a way to break free from these limitations. Silverfort created the only end-to-end identity security platform that secures all identities—humans and machines, on-prem and in the cloud. Our patented Runtime Access Protection (RAP) technology seamlessly integrates with the entire IAM infrastructure and secures it from within with unmatched visibility, analysis, and inline enforcement of security controls. This innovative approach brings protection to all resources in all environments, including ones that were previously impossible to secure, such as legacy systems, service accounts, command-line tools and IT/OT infrastructure. Finally, enterprises can stay ahead of the evolving identity threats, minimize their attack surface, stop breaches before they can spread, close compliance gaps, and break free from countless limitations and endless efforts.  Silverfort is the identity security platform the industry deserves, earning us the trust of more than 1,000 leading organizations, including several Fortune 50 companies.   This is identity security done right.  Join Silverfort, and be part of a team that’s pushing the boundaries of identity security—no compromises, no blind spots, no limits.

summary: Roberto Dagnoni is Chairman of MB | Mercado Bitcoin, the largest digital assets platform in Latin America, and CEO of 2TM, a holding company with a portfolio of ventures and M&As in the digital assets ecosystem.  He led MB’s growth to 4.3 million clients, consolidating the business as an exchange, RWA tokenization platform, and digital bank with operations in Brazil and Portugal - where it is licensed to serve the entire European Union. Under his leadership, MB became Brazil’s first crypto unicorn and ranks among the world’s top five private credit tokenizers. He also brought in investments from SoftBank, 10T, and Tribe, including SoftBank’s largest crypto deal in the region.  An experienced investor, he has executed M&A transactions totaling more than US$6 billion, including the sale of Cetip to B3 and Sascar to GP/Michelin Tires, and backed over 70 startups such as Asaas, Banco Neon, BP, Atta, Figment, Abra, Monetus, Monkey, and CERC.  He is an Endeavor Entrepreneur and YPO member, as well as a board advisor to Asaas, InvestSmart, and LALA - an organization dedicated to developing young leaders. Beyond business, he is passionate about sports and speed, racing motorcycles and cars on iconic tracks and routes worldwide. Dagnoni holds a degree in Accounting (FAE) and has completed executive programs at Harvard, IMD, INSEAD, and IBGC.

headline: VP de Relações Institucionais @Unico | Construindo identidades digitais para pessoas, empresas, coisas e agentes.
summary: Executive, entrepreneur and business advisor, focused on massive digital transformations, with extensive experience in the technology, financial and government industries.  My personal goal is to positively impact the lives of 1 billion people. So far 170 million satisfied users...  @Unico my role is promote public policies to create a trusted and seamless network of identities for millions of people.  As CEO of Cateno, I led the offer of digital payment methods to 30 million Brazilians, having achieved the highest results in the company's history.  Previously, I led the digital transformation of the Brazilian government and founded the gov.br platform, which serves more than 140 million users. With this work, Brazil was recognized as the 2nd best digital government in the world, according to the World Bank.  As a Board member, advisor and mentor to several companies, public and private, I seek to align the strategy and project portfolio with the vision of a digital and integrated society.  In 2020, I was recognized by the World Economic Forum and Apolitical as one of the 50 most influential people in the world revolutionizing government and among the 100 most influential people in digital government in 2018.
organization_description_1: A Unico é uma rede global de identidade que cria confiança entre pessoas e empresas. Identificamos pessoas globalmente para que possam ter acesso digital seguro, eficiente e privado a serviços ao redor do mundo.  Estamos presentes em mais de 20 países e atendemos 165 milhões de usuários, com mais de 1,5 bilhão de verificações de identidade a cada ano. Somos a principal rede global de identidade.  Centenas de empresas inovadoras, bancos, fintechs, operadoras de telecomunicações e empresas de e-commerce ao redor do mundo oferecem seus serviços com taxas de conversão mais altas, melhor experiência do usuário e redução de fraudes de identidade, graças à parceria com a Unico.
position_description_1: Leading Corporate Affairs at Unico, my role is to implement our strategies, engage with key stakeholders, and advise on public policies to create a trusted and seamless network of identities to millions of people.  Unico is a leading biometric verification and authentication company addressing the global challenges of identity management and fraud prevention.   With nearly two decades of experience in the Brazilian market, Unico has become a reliable supplier to over 800 companies, including four of the top five largest banks and leading retailers. Since 2021, Unico has facilitated more than 1.2 billion authentications through digital identity. It is estimated that Unico's solutions have thwarted $14 billion in fraud, by 2023. Valued at over $2.6 billion, the company stands as the second most valuable SaaS company in Latin America, backed by General Atlantics, SoftBank, and Goldman Sachs,  and was recognized as the third most innovative company in Latin America by Fast Company in 2024.

organization_description_3: A reliable cross-border identification system.  We uphold a comprehensive record of universal credentials confirmed by accredited issuers assigned to specific territories. Once they've verified the original essential information for an applicant, LEI issuers distribute unique codes within their given regions. These are then logged in the GLEIF data bank to keep an up-to-date chain of traceable credentials.  LEIs remain trustworthy regardless of the issuing territory because this root authentication, coupled with an accepted global standardization, reinforces a reliable network of organizational identification across borders.  The network underpins LEIs and supports vLEIs – a digital ID secured at the source, permitting software and devices to automatically and cryptographically verify an organization's identity.  The value of GLEIF lies in transparency.  Our global LEI system empowers people, businesses, and governments to make safer decisions, such as with whom to buy from, borrow money, or rely on to administer vaccines - or who to do business with.  We want the LEI and vLEI identification standards to be accessible for all so they are entirely affordable, and our data bank is free to access. We want as many markets, individuals, and communities as possible to benefit from trusted universal credentials.  If you'd like to know more, drop us a DM or click through to our website: https://www.gleif.org
position_description_3: As part of the Financial Stability Board (FSB), the GLEIF plays a critical role in promoting trust and transparency in the global financial markets through the implementation and oversight of the Legal Entity Identifier (LEI) system. The LEI system serves as a unique identifier for legal entities participating in financial transactions, enabling better risk management, regulatory reporting, and overall efficiency in the industry.  Being chosen to serve on the Board of Directors of GLEIF is a tremendous privilege. I am humbled to have the opportunity to contribute to the strategic direction and governance of GLEIF and looking forward to collaborate with fellow board members from multiples countries, all of them experienced industry leaders assigned to advance GLEIF's mission and drive positive change in the financial ecosystem.

Liderando e participando de eventos chave como estruturação de back office e operações de tesouraria, implantação de ERP, lançamentos de FIDCs, emissões de dívidas (Letras Financeiras, Debêntures, etc.) e IPO na NYSE. Responsável pela gestão de modelagem de caixa, liquidez e pelo relacionamento bancário com as instituições, liderando captações, investimentos e cash management.
organization_description_1: A Biz existe para resolver um problema simples — e ignorado por anos: empresas movimentam dinheiro, viabilizam pagamentos e constroem relações financeiras no seu ecossistema, mas quem aparece e fica com a receitas financeiras é o fornecedor.  Nós acreditamos que isso está errado.  Nosso propósito é devolver às empresas o protagonismo do seu ecossistema financeiro, permitindo que soluções bancárias, pagamentos e serviços financeiros reforcem a própria marca, a cultura e o vínculo com colaboradores, clientes e parceiros.  A Biz constrói infraestrutura financeira white-label, para que cada empresa possa ter seu próprio app, cartão, portal, IA e experiências financeiras sob a sua marca — não a do fornecedor.  Nossa visão é clara: toda empresa pode — e deve — ser dona da relação financeira que sustenta o seu negócio.  O nosso diferencial não é apenas tecnologia. É uma convicção: fornecedor não é marca. Infraestrutura não precisa de holofote.  A Biz fica nos bastidores. Construindo o palco. A relação, o valor e a marca ficam com quem realmente importa: o protagonista, que é a empresa.
organization_description_2: A Neon é uma instituição financeira fundada em 2016, sendo a primeira conta digital do Brasil. Já nascemos inconformados e temos um propósito muito claro: fazer seu dinheiro fluir para ver o seu mundo crescer.  Hoje já são mais de 30 milhões de clientes que contam com a Neon como sua parceira para viver no azul, e é por essas pessoas que buscamos, cada vez mais, ser um time excepcional, que trabalha bem junto e faz entregas vencedoras.  Com a nossa política #NeonEmTodoCanto, as pessoas neowners podem trabalhar de onde quiserem, o que impulsiona a criação de um time global e diverso em vivências, histórias e conhecimento.   Nosso trabalho é pelos brasileiros e brasileiras que têm espírito empreendedor e a energia do fazer sendo parte de suas jornadas. Para quem acredita que amanhã sempre haverá um céu azul e muita conquista a ser alcançada :)  Tá pensando em trabalhar com um time talentoso enquanto ajuda o dinheiro fluir para milhares de brasileiros? Aqui é o seu lugar! Vem #ViverNoAzul!  Confira nossas vagas abaixo: https://site.neon.com.br/carreira   Caso queira  conhecer ainda mais sobre a Neon, ficar por dentro das novidades do nosso app e entender tudo que fazemos por aqui, vem acompanhar a gente também no Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/timeneon
organization_description_3: Ajudando milhões de pessoas a repensarem suas finanças!   O RecargaPay é a plataforma financeira que simplifica a vida de mais de 10 milhões de brasileiros. Ajudamos pessoas e pequenos negócios a investir, pagar, pegar empréstimos e ganhar dinheiro de forma simples e segura, tudo em um único aplicativo.  Fundada em 2010 e autorizada pelo Banco Central do Brasil com a licença de SCFI, a RecargaPay combina inovação e propósito para ajudar as pessoas a aproveitarem melhor o seu dinheiro. Com mais de US$ 120 milhões em investimentos, nosso objetivo é tornar os serviços financeiros mais simples, justos e acessíveis para todos.

headline: CEO at Sereel | Institutional DeFi
summary: Lance Davis is a Blockchain Engineer with a BS in Computer Engineering from North Carolina A&T, where he researched machine learning and studied cryptography. Specializing in Rust and Solidity, he builds blockchain-interoperable web services using frameworks like Alloy and Tokio. He has developed ERC-4337 Account Abstraction Wallets with advanced signers like passkeys and zkEmail, and has built AI agents using Eliza and Giza. A fast learner, Lance is currently mastering standardized payments and banking to revolutionize financial systems. Passionate about blockchain, AI, and cryptography, he thrives on solving complex challenges and driving innovation.  Lance is on a mission to multiply the efficiency of the global financial system with https://sereel.com.
position_description_1: Sereel addresses the need for digital asset management software for mid-market financial institutions. Today, custody, tokenization, and market operations are separate entities that can dramatically increase the complexity of launching and managing a tokenized product.  Sereel provides a comprehensive for the entire lifecycle of a tokenized product including custody, compliance, and market access. You can learn something new by reading our blog: https://www.sereel.com/blog
position_description_2: I freelanced as a blockchain and cryptography engineer. I completed three contracts with Metagov, EZKL, and Giza. My solutions support more than $3B. All three gigs involved smart contract applications that solved real-world problems.  At Metagov, I implemented SAFE for DAOs: https://github.com/metagov/SAFEforDAOs, which is an implementation of a Simple Agreement for Future Equity in the form of a smart contract. One of the earliest implementations of a company equity RWA.  At EZKL and Giza, I worked on engineering projects related to the convergence of cryptography and machine learning. I was able to prove several different machine learning models with various zero knowledge proof algorithms. I used halo2 (PLONK based SNARKs) for proving with EZKL, and Cairo (AIR based STARKs). I also built auxillary tooling for using zkml, including some of the earliest implementations of AI agents.
organization_description_3: Founded in 2009 by Marc Andreessen and Ben Horowitz, Andreessen Horowitz (known as "a16z") is a venture capital firm that backs bold entrepreneurs building the future through technology. We are stage agnostic: We invest in seed to late-stage technology companies, across the consumer, enterprise, bio/healthcare, crypto, fintech and games spaces.  a16z is defined by respect for the entrepreneur and the entrepreneurial company building process; we know what it’s like to be in the founder’s shoes. The firm is led by general partners, many of whom are former founders/operators, CEOs, or CTOs of successful technology companies, and who have domain expertise ranging from biology to crypto to distributed systems to security to marketplaces to financial services.  We aim to connect entrepreneurs, investors, executives, engineers, academics, industry experts, and others in the technology ecosystem. We have built a network of experts including technical and executive talent; top media and marketing resources; Fortune 500/Global 2000 companies; as well as other technology decision makers, influencers, and key opinion leaders. a16z uses this network as part of our commitment to help our portfolio companies grow their business, so our operating teams provide entrepreneurs with access to expertise and insights across the entire spectrum of company building.  https://a16z.com/portfolio/   https://a16z.com/podcasts/   https://a16z.com/videos/   http://a16z.com/subscribe

headline: Founder & CEO, 2MR Labs | AI & Digital Assets | From Special Forces to Frontier Tech Leadership
summary: Arthur is the founder and CEO of 2MR labs, a world leading digital assets consultancy and digital assets company, that also wholly owns Giants Protocol, a firm that has a digital assets treasury and a listed coin on Binance. He is a highly sought-after speaker within the digital assets industry and has advised and executed on multiple digital asset mandates. Arthur was also the Founder-CEO of Zombie Run (RFYL), a concept lifestyle long distance entertainment run and event as well as prior to that, was the Former-Special Forces Commander in Singapore and an US Ranger Graduate. He holds an Engineering degree (Hons) from Nanyang Technological University in Singapore.
organization_description_1: 2MR Labs (Tomorrow Labs) is Southeast Asia’s first Web3 launchpad to build technologies that bring real world value to global brands in the form of digital assets.   Supported by the founders behind SpaceChain (a platform integrating blockchain nodes with satellites) and Action X (world-leading sports events), 2MR Labs is the go-to for brands wishing to engage with their consumers in the ever dynamic Web3 space.  Our long-term mandate, backed by institutional investors, is to drive the mass adoption of digital assets, maximising the potential of businesses and communities around Southeast Asia.
position_description_1: 2MR Labs integrates Strategic Consulting, Frontier Tech Infrastructure, and Capital Solutions to serve as the Sovereign Intelligence Architect that builds the AI, financial, and data systems, that nations depend on to govern, defend, and grow in the digital age. 2MR is building the next-generation operating system for governments that require full visibility and control over capital flows, digital assets, AI models, and national data infrastructure. The Core Pillars The firm is structured across three core pillars designed to act as the technical Command Centre for sovereign states: 1. Strategic Consulting: Providing solution-neutral advisory to governments and ministries on Sovereign AI frameworks, Digital Assets Regulation and Total Defense Solutions. 2. Frontier Tech Infrastructure: Engineering the "National Brain" using Sovereign LLMs built on Model Context Protocol (MCP) and Sovereign Blockchains. 3. Capital Solutions: Pioneering Real-World Asset (RWA) tokenization and designing Treasury Management systems to attract global Foreign Direct Investment (FDI).
organization_description_2: On May 27, 1947, the Singapore Olympic and Sports Council was created. A year later, it sent its first athlete, high jumper Lloyd Valberg, to the London Olympic Games.   Since then, the council which was renamed the Singapore National Olympic Council (SNOC) in 1970, has ensured Singapore has an almost constant presence in all major Games around the world. Singapore has participated in every Olympic, Asian, Commonwealth and South-east Asia Games, except for the 1980 Moscow Olympics.   On four occasions, Singapore hosted the SEA Games and the country was chosen by the International Olympic Committee to hold the inaugural Youth Olympic Games in 2010.   In 2016, swimmer Joseph Schooling joined the ranks of Singapore Olympic medalists - Tan Howe Liang, Feng Tianwei, Li Jiawei and Wang Yuegu - when he won a gold medal in the 100m butterfly event.   Today, the SNOC, helmed by Mr Tan Chuan-Jin, continues to promote the Olympic Movement in Singapore with its stakeholders and its charity organisation, the Singapore Olympic Foundation.
organization_description_3: OUR ARMY: READY, DECISIVE, RESPECTED  Our Army is the bedrock of our nation's defence. We draw our strength from our Regulars, NSFs and Operationally Ready NSmen. Decisive in war, we will fight and win to defend our country.   Respected by all, our Army is a trusted national institution. We forge the fighting spirit of our people to secure our future and protect our way of life.

headline: CRO | Commercial Director | IGaming Specialist | Mass Payments | Fintech
summary: Sou um profissional de vendas e crescimento com mais de 16 anos de experiência na construção, estruturação e liderança de operações comerciais, sempre muito próximo da execução, dos números e das pessoas.  Ao longo da minha trajetória, atuei na interseção entre estratégia comercial, liderança de equipes e crescimento de receita, com forte especialização em operações de iGaming, mercados regulados e negócios de alto volume transacional. Tenho como foco transformar bases ativas de clientes em motores sustentáveis de faturamento, combinando visão comercial com profundidade operacional.  Meu perfil é genuinamente hands on. Gosto de entender os processos de ponta a ponta — desde funil de vendas e negociação até onboarding, compliance e eficiência operacional. Aprender novos modelos, produtos e mercados não é um discurso, mas parte essencial da forma como me mantenho relevante e eficaz em setores altamente dinâmicos.  Tenho experiência na liderança e estruturação de equipes comerciais, definição de estratégias de crescimento para carteiras ativas, melhoria de métricas de retenção e expansão, além de apoiar empresas em momentos de escala, regulação e aumento de complexidade — especialmente no ecossistema de iGaming, onde execução, precisão e conformidade são decisivas.  Tenho interesse especial em:  - Construção e escala de equipes comerciais de alta performance - Crescimento de receita a partir da base ativa (upsell, cross-sell e retenção) - Estruturação de operações comerciais em mercados regulados e de risco elevado - Parcerias com empresas que valorizam liderança prática, orientada a resultado  Estou sempre aberto a conversas relevantes com parceiros do setor e líderes de negócio que buscam clareza, execução consistente e crescimento de longo prazo.

summary: CEO and board advisor with a passion for driving meaningful change through digital transformation and hyper automation. As the founder and CEO of Certsys, I had the privilege of building a company that leverages cutting-edge technology to create real value for clients, helping them overcome challenges and achieve sustainable growth. My approach is straightforward: put the customer at the center, empower people to succeed, and drive solutions that make a difference. With over 20 years of experience, I’ve learned that success comes from focusing on outcomes, staying humble, and always pushing for improvement. The journey has been shaped by incredible learning experiences, including Harvard’s Owner/President Management (OPM) program and Stanford’s Executive Program (SEP), where I deepened my understanding of strategic thinking, governance, and customer-centric leadership. I’m fortunate to be part of a global network, from the Entrepreneurs Organization (EO) to alumni connections at Harvard and Stanford. These networks allow me to learn, share, and collaborate with like-minded leaders who are committed to making a positive impact. With a background in both strategic leadership and technology, I bring a balanced perspective to the boardroom—one that combines deep technical knowledge with a clear focus on growth, governance, and operational excellence. I’m committed to helping organizations navigate complex challenges and seize opportunities for transformation.
organization_description_1: PANROTAS is the leading travel trade publishing company in Brazil. It is specialized in providing knowledge for tourism professionals on a diversity of channels: print publications, digital media, events and research. PANROTAS é a empresa líder na comunicação com o profissional de turismo no Brasil por meio de vários canais: publicações impressas, mídia digital, eventos e pesquisas.
organization_description_2: Entrepreneurs shape the future, sparking innovation, creating jobs, empowering dreams. We believe in challenging the status quo and finding solutions, one business at a time. While that journey can bring influence, recognition, and personal reward, it can also be arduous and lonely. Mindful of the unique pressures and isolation experienced along many an entrepreneur’s path, in 1987, a group of young pioneers designed a solution: a membership community dedicated exclusively by entrepreneurs, for entrepreneurs who have a proven record of success.  Soon, that collective grew from a few hundred to many thousands, evolving into the Entrepreneurs’ Organization (EO). Today, EO welcomes entrepreneurs everywhere, connecting 18,000 of the world’s leading entrepreneurs from every sector, generation, culture, and walk of life across 80+ countries worldwide. We create belonging, forge connections, exchange diverse perspectives, and share extraordinary experiences, all year long.  What makes our community special? In a word: connection. With EO, we go beyond the business to the whole entrepreneur, gaining insights that we pass on to our families and work teams. We recognize the interconnectedness of our success and learn to balance individual achievements with collective impacts. By gathering locally and connecting globally – in chapters, in regions, as one borderless community – we experience a 360-degree entrepreneurial journey that unlocks more of our full potential. As members of EO’s local and global communities, we belong, so we can become even more.  Join EO and engage in a diverse collective that is always learning, always growing, and thinking big while being bold. Together, we will move the world forward.

organization_description_3: Somos um ecossistema de tecnologia e inovação que transforma a adoção de jornadas digitais em valor para os negócios. Com mais de 16 anos de experiência, nossa empresa é uma multinacional brasileira com operações presentes na Europa e Reino Unido.   Nosso ecossistema abrange a orquestração de jornadas digitais completas, oferecendo um conjunto de competências que nos permite desenvolver iniciativas sem partir do zero. Nossa abordagem é personalizada, flexível e centrada na cocriação das melhores estratégias para geração de valor.   Com alta especialização em setores como varejo, saúde e mercado financeiro, e por meio do Digital Value Creation, nosso framework proprietário, oferecemos soluções que impulsionam a aceleração de receitas, elevam a eficiência operacional, ativam novas fontes de receita e criam projetos de impacto. Contamos ainda com um núcleo de Inteligência Artificial que promove a adoção eficiente e integrada dessas tecnologias.   Ao longo da nossa jornada, as empresas Omnik, Nação Digital, SGA, Play Studio, Dojo, Distrito, Beta-i, Avanti e Defense que são referência em seus campos de atuação, se juntaram ao grupo FCamara para fortalecer o ecossistema e proporcionar aos nossos clientes acesso a um conjunto incomparável de recursos e conhecimentos especializados.

organization_description_1: ENABLING NEUROTECHNOLOGY Paradromics’ Brain-Computer Interface (BCI) platform records brain activity at the highest possible resolution: the individual neuron. Our AI algorithms decode this massive amount of brain-data, enabling the seamless translation of thought into treatments.  THE MISSION Data-driven BCI-based technologies for brain health Our technology will help millions with unmet medical needs suffering from paralysis and movement disorders to chronic pain, addiction, depression and other mental health conditions.  ABOUT Matt Angle Ph.D. (CEO) founded Paradromics to build a high-data-rate BCI platform capable of addressing critical unmet clinical needs. With early funding from the NIH and DARPA, the company developed its core neurotechnology and, by 2019, shifted focus to its first product: the Connexus® BCI.   Connexus is designed to restore communication through text, synthesized speech, and computer control for people with severe motor impairments, including those caused by ALS, stroke, or spinal cord injury. Backed by two FDA Breakthrough Device Designations and a successful first-in-human recording in May 2025, Paradromics is now preparing to launch a clinical trial in late 2025 to evaluate the long-term safety and participant benefits of their first product, the Connexus BCI.

summary: Chris McGee is a Managing Director at AArete ("uh-reet"​) and leads AArete’s Global Financial Services (FS) Consulting Practice. AArete partners with FS firms to drive growth and boost competitiveness by optimizing digital and technology capabilities, risk management and cybersecurity solutions, strategic profitability initiatives, regulatory compliance functions, and M&A strategies.   Chris brings 20 years of experience across FS sectors (e.g., retail, commercial, corporate, and investment banking, capital markets, securities, investment and wealth management, insurance, fintech). He is passionate about helping organizations and their people realize their potential, achieve their business goals, and deliver operational excellence. He has a strong track record of partnering with executive leaders driving strategic change across global businesses to solve complex operating model challenges and enable sustainable results.  Prior to AArete, Chris was a Global Director and Team Leader at Gartner partnering with FS firms on client-centric innovations. He served as a trusted advisor to guide the planning and execution of FS business strategies through digital products and platforms and new technology-based solutions to enhance customer and client experiences across channels and geographies while also improving employee experiences.   Previously, Chris was a Director in PwC's US Advisory FS Practice where he led management and risk consulting engagements with multidisciplinary teams primarily supporting global FS firms to shape enterprise solutions. He managed global initiatives for clients including strategic business transformations, as well as risk management, compliance, and regulatory remediation programs.   Chris also advises start-up organizations on their product innovations. Most recently, he has served as an external strategic advisor to KeeperAI, which is a SaaS platform that enables the formation of deeper relationships to empower people to connect authentically and companies to retain employees via healthy work cultures.  Chris earned a Master of Business Administration from Columbia University completing the Executive Program (EMBA) at Columbia Business School in New York, NY and holds a Bachelor of Science (BS) in Finance and Marketing from Fairfield University’s Dolan School of Business in Fairfield, CT. Outside of the office, he values family, volunteerism, mentorship, and giving back to one’s community.   If you're interested in learning more about working with me, feel free to reach out. summary: My superpower? Turning strategy into execution, and ideas into revenue.  I don’t just set strategy—I roll up my sleeves, dive into the details, and partner with teams to unblock obstacles. I believe real innovation comes from understanding the nuances of how things work, diagnosing why problems arise, and executing solutions with speed and precision. I’m up and ready by 5am because execution doesn’t wait, and neither do I. My focus is always on removing friction, accelerating execution, and ensuring great ideas don’t just sit on a whiteboard—they drive real results.  My career is a mash-up of Wall Street analytics, fintech venture capital, and alternative investment data strategy—all cemented with a Columbia MBA, a CFA charter, and real-world financial street smarts. Today, as VP of Corporate Development, Strategy & Partnerships at Katapult, I’m scaling partnerships, driving enterprise growth, and executing strategic deals that redefine how businesses operate.  How I Work:  🧩 C-Level Advisor – I cut through complexity, delivering data-backed strategies and execution roadmaps that help leadership teams see around corners and move with confidence.  🚀 Growth & Product Strategist – I craft go-to-market strategies, uncovering new revenue streams and scaling opportunities that give companies an edge.  💼 Strategic Deal Architect – Whether it's M&A, partnerships, or business transformation, I negotiate, structure, and execute high-impact deals that drive bottom-line results.  ⚙️ Problem Solver & Execution Partner – I don’t just manage from a distance—I embed with teams to break down barriers, refine processes, and fast-track execution. That’s my secret.  🤝 Team Mobilizer & Culture Builder – Success isn’t just about strategy—it’s about people. I align stakeholders, drive collaboration, and foster an environment where execution matches ambition.  I care deeply—about the people I work with, the companies I help scale, and the impact we create. My "say-do" ratio is high—if I commit to something, I follow through.  When I’m not driving strategy and corporate development, you’ll find me smoking BBQ, skiing, traveling with my wife and kids, or embracing my post-pandemic hobbies of gardening and camping.  If you're a builder, a disruptor, or someone who thrives on turning big ideas into real impact, let’s connect. Together, we can push boundaries and create something exceptional.

organization_description_1: DocDoc is the world’s first patient intelligence company. Our vision is to empower patients to make data-driven healthcare decisions which are safe, transparent, and fair.   We use technology in conjunction with medically trained professionals to optimise healthcare outcomes and cost, and enhance the patient’s end-to-end healthcare journey. DocDoc combines AI-powered doctor discovery, telemedicine, and digital Third Party Administrator services onto a single platform. With this platform, DocDoc enables insurance companies to offer a differentiated product in a crowded market, employers to attract and retain world-class employees, and governments to improve accessibility and affordability of healthcare services for their citizens.  DocDoc is an independent company with deep expertise in healthcare quality. We seek physicians, clinics, and hospitals with excellent outcomes who believe they are the best at what they do. We then spend hours with each doctor, investigating quality of care and documenting procedures and conditions where the physician excels. We review national records to confirm credentials and discover any legal action. Then, we enter information from multiple sources into a sophisticated system that finds a best match between a unique patient need and unique physician experience.  Our model is that everyone wins. The patient finds a highly qualified doctor to treat their condition. The physician, who excels in specific treatments and procedures, has a company validate their expertise and send select patients to them so they can focus on clinical care. The insurance firms, knowing that happy policyholders maintain memberships and employers knowing that healthy employees are more productive, pay us a modest fee to assure their patients make informed medical decisions. The service is free of charge to providers to ensure transparency and avoid conflict of interest.

headline: #wearehagens
summary: Com 30 anos de carreira, possui forte viés de inovação, criatividade e tecnologia.   Foi finalista 5 vezes do prêmio profissionais do ano da Rede Globo sendo vencedor por duas vezes. Também foi vencedor do prêmio Ibest, o oscar da internet brasileira, criando e desenvolvendo o primeiro portal do agronegócio brasileiro, o Portal do Campo, para o branco Bradesco, em 2001. headline: Azure Cloud Consultant - Microservices, Kubernetes, Kafka, Functional programming, CQRS, Event Sourcing, Serverless, F#
summary: I specialise in developing Cloud-Native Applications using .NET Core and Azure Cloud. Throughout the last 17 years, I worked on many projects, clients, technical stacks, and productive scenarios. This experience makes me a valuable resource for any team aiming to deliver high-quality production code for mission-critical workloads. I am constantly investing in the improvement of my skills. I had the opportunity to lead greenfield projects and am also very experienced in maintaining and evolving existing systems. I can learn fast, and I am an excellent team player.  I am particularly interested in innovative, risky, and complex projects. I have a particular interest in learning new programming languages and technologies. I actively work on pet projects to learn new programming languages and stacks.  Tech:  * 17+ years of Experience in .NET / .NET Core Development.  * Azure Kubernetes Services (AKS), Docker and Azure DevOps workflows for containerized workloads * Azure management + Azure DevOps: YAML Pipelines, PowerShell scripting. Bicep, Azure ARM Templates, Azure CLI, TypeScript, JavaScript * Azure Log Analytics, Application Insights, Kusto Query Language (KQL), Advanced Excel (plugin dev, Power Query, Data Analysis) * Experience with Event-Driven systems – Confluent Kafka, Confluent Schema Registry and .NET Core + patterns like event-carried state transfer, notifications and others * Azure Functions, Azure Durable Functions, CosmosDB + Change Feed, Azure Event Hubs, Azure Service Bus, Azure Event Grid, Azure SignalR either in serverless or containerized solutions.  * Azure AAD and Azure AD B2C with Custom Policies and Identity Experience Framework, RBAC, Azure KeyVault and security of APIs in general * Azure API Management * Azure Data Factory and Azure SQL + Elastic Pool * Actor Model with Akka.NET (both C# and F#) * Queues: RabbitMQ, ZeroMQ and Azure Service Bus * Relational Databases: mostly SQL Server and MySQL. I have some experience in the past with Oracle, PostgreSQL * NoSQL experience mostly on CosmosDB, MongoDB and Neo4j * Windows Services, multi-threaded programming, asynchronous programming * Working knowledge of Linux Systems (CentOS7, Fedora, Ubuntu) + Linux development using Mono and .NET Core, Docker * JMeter, Blazemeter, Application Profiling, Windbg, Perfview, SysInternals  -----------------  I am European Citizen - Portugal and Brazilian Not willing to relocate to any country at this time No US Visa / No H1B / No plans to move to the US / Not looking for any kind of visa sponsorship

headline: Web3 & Tokenization Consultant | Helping Companies Adopt Blockchain, Crypto & Digital Assets | ex-Binance | Founder Valuation Express (AI) | Web3 Career Mentor
summary: Actively working in the global cryptocurrency market since 2018, I develop strategic blockchain, tokenization, and Web3 projects for companies and startups looking to integrate digital assets into their business models. My work connects technology, strategy, and market structure, helping organizations navigate one of the most innovative and complex sectors of the digital economy. Over the past years, I have participated in the development and expansion of several initiatives within the blockchain ecosystem, including financial infrastructure projects, asset tokenization models, and crypto platform development. I was the first Brazilian professional to join the international three-month XRPL ecosystem program, participating in the XRPL Commons DeFi cohort in Paris, which expanded my perspective on blockchain infrastructure, innovation, and global opportunities for Web3 businesses. In 2022, I served as Corporate Manager for Latin America at Binance, leading institutional relationships and strategic partnerships across the region. Today, I work as an independent Web3 consultant, supporting companies in initiatives such as: • Blockchain adoption strategy • Token design and tokenomics structuring • Asset tokenization (security and utility tokens) • DeFi platform structuring • Startup valuation • Investment readiness and fundraising preparation • Economic modeling for digital ecosystems Recent projects include: • Development of tokenization models • Consulting on organizational structuring and valuation processes for M&A involving crypto and AI companies • Structuring blockchain-based products for new digital business models • Development of tools to expand the use of applied artificial intelligence in business environments I am co-founder of ChainSchool, an initiative focused on education for the new economy, connecting blockchain technology, business, and career development. My professional background includes experience in the traditional financial market and global corporations such as XP Investimentos and Coca-Cola, before transitioning fully into the crypto ecosystem. I am also the author of the award-winning eBook Boy x Bitcoin, focused on cryptocurrency and blockchain education. Today, I also provide mentorship for professionals transitioning from traditional careers to the Web3 market, helping them build solid pathways into this emerging industry. If your company is exploring tokenization, blockchain, or digital assets, or if you would like to better understand the opportunities of the Web3 economy, I would be happy to connect.
